Creating new Avalanche (AVAX), Solana (SOL) & many more crypto wallets is easy, and buying and selling with exchange functionality makes acquiring these assets seamless. Edge Bitcoin Wallet Features • Secure crypto wallet and blockchain app • Easy to use Bitcoin & cryptocurrency wallet app with support for top crypto assets like Bitcoin Cash, Ethereum (ETH), Litecoin (LTC), Binance Coin (BNB), Ripple (XRP), Avalanche (AVAX), Monero (XMR), Polygon (MATIC), Hedera (HBAR), and more • Zero-knowledge architecture & zero-access to user funds, keys, or transaction data by Edge or 3rd parties • Simple account creation using just a username & password • Hierarchical Deterministic crypto wallets with changing addresses per transaction • Decentralized server architecture. Sending, receiving, and storing crypto works even if Edge servers are down. • Open-source code. Available at https://github.com/Airbitz • Built-in crypto exchanging to buy & sell cryptocurrency like Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Litecoin (LTC), Binance, Avalanche (AVAX), Monero (XMR), Solana (SOL), Polygon (MATIC), Hedera (HBAR) and more! Privacy Notice The Edge application requests access to the device contact list, and personal information. This information is used on the device to provide an improved user experience in the following ways: 1. Autocomplete contacts from the user's address book after a transaction 2. Autocomplete contacts from the user's address book to send email or SMS payment requests No personal info or contact list info ever leaves the device without first being encrypted by the user's credentials (username/password). Neither Edge nor any 3rd party can access the information requested by the application.

description:
Die Bitcoin.com Wallet ist eine einfach zu bedienende, selbst verwahrende Multichain-Wallet, die Ihnen die volle Kontrolle über alle Ihre Kryptowährungsbestände gibt. Sie können:

-> Bitcoin (BTC), Bitcoin Cash (BCH), Ethereum (ETH), Avalanche (AVAX), Polygon (MATIC), BNB und ausgewählte ERC-20-Token schnell und einfach mit Kreditkarte, Google Pay und mehr kaufen.

-> Kryptowährungen in Ihre lokale Währung verkaufen (in ausgewählten Regionen).

-> Senden, empfangen und tauschen Sie zwischen Kryptowährungen.

-> Greifen Sie auf DeFi-Apps und dApps zu, mit denen Sie Zinsen auf Ihre Kryptowährungen verdienen, Ausleihen und Verleihen, an NFT-Marktplätzen teilnehmen, synthetische Vermögenswerte anlegen und vieles mehr.
Die wichtigsten Funktionen beinhalten:

SELBSTVERWAHRUNG
Ihre Krypto-Assets sind extrem sicher, weil nur Sie darauf zugreifen können. Selbstverwahrung bedeutet, dass nicht einmal Bitcoin.com Zugang zu Ihren Geldern hat, und Sie können Ihre Vermögenswerte jederzeit leicht in ein anderes Krypto-Wallet übertragen. Keine Bindungen, keine Risiken durch Dritte, keine Insolvenzgefahr, und Sie werden nie wieder um Erlaubnis bitten, Ihr Geld zu benutzen.

DEFI-BEREIT
Verbinden Sie sich mit Ethereum, Avalanche, Polygon und BNB Smart Chain dApps über WalletConnect (v2). Das bedeutet, dass Sie Zinsen auf Ihre Kryptowährungen verdienen, mit dezentralisierten Börsen handeln, an NFT-Marktplätzen teilnehmen, auf Kreditmärkte zugreifen können und vieles, vieles mehr.

SCHNELLER & SICHERER ZUGANG
Entsperren Sie Ihre Wallet-App mit biometrischen Daten oder PIN.

AUTOMATISCHES BACKUP
Sichern Sie automatisch alle Ihre Wallets in der Cloud und entschlüsseln Sie sie mit einem einzigen Master-Passwort. Ersetzen Sie den Aufwand, zahlreiche geheime Phrases zu verwalten, durch die Bequemlichkeit und Sicherheit eines einzigen benutzerdefinierten Passworts. (Sie können trotzdem noch Ihre einzelnen Seed Phrases manuell verwalten).

ANPASSBARE GEBÜHREN
Sie bestimmen die Netzwerkgebühr. Erhöhen Sie die Gebühr für schnellere Netzwerkbestätigungen. Senken Sie sie, wenn Sie es nicht eilig haben. Bitcoin.com erhebt KEINE Gebühren für öffentliche Blockchain-Transaktionen.

LOW-FEE CHAINS
Die Multichain Bitcoin.com Wallet hat sich dazu verpflichtet, Ihnen Zugang zu kostengünstigen Blockchains zu bieten, damit Sie Peer-to-Peer-Cash so nutzen können, wie es gedacht war UND das Beste aus den Möglichkeiten von DeFi und Web3 machen können.

AVALANCHE UNTERSTÜTZUNG
Kaufen, verkaufen, tauschen, halten und verwalten Sie AVAX, den nativen Token der Avalanche-Blockchain. Sie können auch Token verwalten und dApps im Avalanche-Netzwerk nutzen.

POLYGON UNTERSTÜTZUNG
Kaufen, verkaufen, tauschen, halten und verwalten Sie MATIC, den nativen Token der Polygon-Blockchain. Sie können auch Token verwalten und dApps im Polygon-Netzwerk nutzen.

BNB SMART CHAIN UNTERSTÜTZUNG
Kaufen, verkaufen, tauschen, halten und verwalten Sie BNB, den nativen Token von BNB Smart Chain. Sie können auch dApps im Netzwerk nutzen.

GETEILTE WALLETS (MULTI-SIG)
Erstellen Sie Multi-Signature-Wallets, um Gelder mit Ihrem Team oder Freunden und Familie zu verwalten.

ENTDECKEN SIE
Verwenden Sie den Discover-Bereich in der App, um Händler in Ihrer Nähe zu finden, die Kryptowährungszahlungen im Laden akzeptieren. Stöbern Sie auf Websites, auf denen Sie mit Krypto bezahlen können, und entdecken Sie andere coole Funktionen wie Spiele, Geschenkkarten und mehr.

GEPRÜFT VON KUDELSKI SECURITY
Eine umfassende Prüfung durch Cybersecurity-Experten hat bewiesen, dass es kein realistisches Szenario gibt, in dem ein Angreifer in der Lage wäre, die privaten Schlüssel eines Benutzers zu kompromittieren.

DAS BITCOIN- UND KRYPTOWÄHRUNGS-WALLET, MIT DEM SIE DIE KONTROLLE HABEN
Kaufen, verkaufen, tauschen, investieren, verdienen & nutzen Sie Kryptowährungen wie Bitcoin (BTC), Bitcoin Cash (BCH), Ethereum (ETH) und viele mehr in der selbstverwahrten DeFi Crypto Wallet, der Millionen vertrauen.

description: Delta Exchange is an FIU-registered, derivatives-focused crypto exchange pioneering INR-settled crypto derivatives. Trusted by traders across the world, Delta Exchange allows users to trade BTC, ETH call and put options, perpetual futures on a wide range of cryptocurrencies, and spot markets for BTC, ETH and more — all within a single trading interface. Delta Exchange is the premier destination for trading crypto options. These options are available at daily, weekly, and monthly expiries. For each expiry, a wide range of strikes are made available to give traders more flexibility. Also, features like strategy builder, basket orders, and a rich set of analytics are provided to help traders succeed. Delta Exchange offers perpetual contracts on a wide variety of cryptocurrencies. These include Bitcoin(BTC), Ether(ETH), Ripple(XRP), Solana(SOL) and Binance Coin(BNB). These perpetual futures can be traded at up to 200x leverage. Delta Exchange lists innovative derivative contracts that are exclusive to the exchange. These include option spread contracts (call spread and put spread), Straddle and strangle contracts. These contracts enable traders to enjoy lower trading fees & slippages and greater margin efficiency. Along with the derivatives, the exchange also offers spot trading for BTC and ETH and more, giving users access to these widely traded cryptocurrencies. Delta Exchange provides high-speed, secure, and free APIs for futures and options trading, empowering traders to execute low-latency bots and deploy fully automated algorithmic strategies with ease. With the built-in API Copilot, you can quickly generate and debug trading code using AI-assisted guidance. Traders can explore the Algo Marketplace to subscribe to ready-made strategies, and use Trading Bot to connect external signals — all designed to make algorithmic crypto trading simpler & faster. Features: ◼ Wide range of options contracts with daily, weekly, and monthly expiries ◼ INR settlement to deposit and withdraw funds easily ◼ Small lot sizes: Start trading with as low as INR 100 ◼ Trade 24/7 without downtime ◼ Use limit, market, stop, and bracket orders ◼ Execute trades at market prices with high-speed matching ◼ Multi-factor security protocols protect your assets ◼ API-Based Algorithmic Trading ◼ Earn rewards by referring new users ◼ 24/7 dedicated assistance ◼ Options/Futures/Spot all on a single trading interface Why Trade on Delta Exchange? ◼ Trusted Platform: Over 8 years of smooth operation as a leading crypto derivatives exchange in India. ◼ Mobile Trading: Keep track of the market anytime and trade crypto FnO on the go with our mobile app. ◼ Quick Sign-Up: Register within 30 seconds and start crypto futures and options trading immediately. ◼ INR settlement: Benefit from INR settlement on an FIU-registered platform. ◼ No Crypto-Related Taxes on FnO Trading: Trade without 1% TDS and 30% flat tax, making INR settlement convenient on FnO. Delta Exchange is your go-to crypto derivatives exchange in India for crypto futures and options trading. You can trade Bitcoin, Ether and more across spot, perpetual futures, as well as BTC and ETH call and put options, with benefits of INR settlement on an FIU-registered platform. Download the Delta Exchange app today to experience top-tier crypto trading. description:
TokenPocket is the world's leading multi-chain decentralized wallet and gateway to the Web3 world. Since its launch in 2018, it has provided self-custody crypto asset services to over 25 million users worldwide.TokenPocket is the most competitive wallet for BTC, ETH, BNBCHAIN, Polygon, Solana, TRON, Dogecoin, and Layer 2 chains like Arbitrum, Optimism, and Base. Connect to 1,000+ networks, thousands of DApps, and the entire Web3 ecosystem. Store, swap, transfer, receive, and trade cryptocurrencies within the wallet, enjoying a secure, one-stop decentralized trading and marketplace service.

Security
• 	Truly Own Your Keys: Private keys are stored on user’s device with encryption, ensuring no one else can access your keys.
• Watch Wallet & Cold Wallet: Monitor on-chain wallet addresses with TokenPocket's "Watch Wallet." Cold wallet, used in conjunction with hardware wallets (Keypal, Trezor, Ledger, etc.), ensure operations remain secure without private keys touching the internet.
• WalletConnect: Allows for synchronization of digital assets on PC without importing private keys to the PC.
• Multi-Sig Wallet: Enhance security by requiring multiple signatures, reducing single-point-of-failure risks.
• AA Wallet: Utilize smart contracts and account abstraction technologies to improve security and prevent private key leaks.
• Passphrase: Only those with the correct mnemonic and passphrase can access and control the assets, adding an extra layer of security to your mnemonic.
• Private Wallet: Customize "Subspace" to enable multiple identities, enhancing privacy.
• Approval Detector: Detects approved contracts and revokes risky approvals.
• Token Check: Identify token contracts to avoid fraud.

Multi-Chain Support
• Extensive Blockchain Support: Supports mainstream Layer 2 and public chains including Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), BNBChain (BNB), Polygon, Solana, TRON (TRX), Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, and more.
• Custom Network: Easily customize and add thousands of EVM compatible chains.
• Bitcoin Ecosystem: Supports protocols like Ordinals, BRC20, RUNES, RGB, Nostr and Bitcoin Layer 2 chains, making it a favorite Bitcoin wallet among users.

DApp & Browser
• DApp Support: Integrated with thousands of global DApps, optimized for faster loading and better user experience.
• DApp Browser: A powerful built-in DApp browser allows access to DApps on dozens of public chains and thousands of EVM chains, even if the DApps aren't listed, providing an entry point to the Web3 world.

Trading Market
• Instant Exchange & Cross-Chain: Aggregates liquidity from Uniswap, Jupiter, Pancake, Raydium, and other DEXs for optimized trading across multiple chains at the best prices. We also offer professional cross-chain bridge services to ensure seamless asset liquidity.
• Market Trends: Access real-time data, discover trending tokens, view candlesticks, price fluctuations, transaction history, and liquidity, offering users the most accurate decentralized trading experience.

User Experience
• Multi-Language & Multi-Currency: Supports dozens of languages including English, Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Hindi, Spanish and more. Displays in multiple fiat currencies, catering to millions of users worldwide.
• Transaction Acceleration: Resolves network congestion issues for BTC, ETH, etc., ensuring smoother transactions.
• Network Fee Subsidy: Supports TRON network energy rental and fee subsidies, reducing transaction costs by up to 75%.
• On-Ramp Portal: Provides fiat-to-crypto purchase services for users among over 200 countries and regions.
• Batch Transfer: Supports batch transfer functionality for efficient management of multiple accounts.

Easily import or create a wallet in TokenPocket to explore the blockchain world. We also offer quick and secure onboarding guidance to help new users get started swiftly. For any questions, please contact us.

Web: https://tokenpocket.pro
Twitter: https://twitter.com/TokenPocket_TP
Email: service@tokenpocket.pro

Combining both centralized and decentralized features, Cwallet empowers over 50 million users with a streamlined, feature-rich experience for managing, paying, swapping and earning from their cryptocurrencies — all in one place.

Why Cwallet?

---
Core Features
Multi-Chain Crypto Wallet
 Easily manage Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Tether (USDT), TRON (TRX), Dogecoin (DOGE), SATS, Solana (SOL), Cardano (ADA), Sui (SUI), Stellar (XLM), XRP and 1000+ digital assets across 60+ chains. Track your portfolio in real time with customizable views in this decentralized wallet and NFT wallet.

Crypto Swap & Zero-Fee Exchange
Execute cross-chain token swaps with optimized routes for the best prices and minimal slippage. Enjoy zero-fee exchanges on select trading pairs. empowered by Cwallet's crypto swap engine and token bridge integration
Grow Your Crypto Assets on principal-protected products

Crypto Borrowing Solutions
Borrow USDT, BTC, or ETH by collateralizing your crypto assets. Transactions are executed via smart contracts to ensure transparency and security  for asset-backed lending

Telegram Wallet & Community Tools
Use Cwallet seamlessly within Telegram to send and receive crypto instantly — no wallet addresses needed. Automate community engagement with powerful tools:
- Launch automated airdrop campaigns
- Enable tipping, giveaways, and loyalty rewards in chats and groups
- Set up paid subscriptions and exclusive crypto-access memberships
- Verify users' asset holdings to unlock premium roles
- Manage whitelists, automate prize distributions, and deploy token drops Whether you're building a Web3 project, NFT community, or DAO, Cwallet powers smarter, faster crypto management — all integrated within Telegram as a leading social wallet

Crypto Payments & Virtual Cards
Shop globally with crypto using the Cozy Card (Virtual Card), compatible with Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal. Send mobile airtime recharges, make bulk payroll payments, and issue branded gift cards with ease using your secure crypto wallet.

Top-Tier Security
- Passkey login and two-factor authentication (2FA)
- Cold wallet storage for the majority of user funds
- HSM-grade private key protection
- Regular third-party audits to ensure system integrity
- Designed with enhanced privacy considerations, Cwallet offers secure crypto transactions and integration-ready architecture for future zk-SNARK and ZK-Rollup technologies.

Built for Everyone
From crypto beginners to DeFi veterans, Cwallet serves individuals, creators, community managers, startups, and enterprises.

---

description:
Transform the way you collect and cook recipes. Cookpad is the world's largest home cooking community — trusted by millions of home cooks to write and share their own recipes, import from any website or social media in one tap, and then find everything instantly by ingredient or name.

YOUR PERSONAL RECIPE COLLECTION — FROM ANYWHERE
• Import any recipe from any website or social media posts to your collection in one tap. Every recipe you love, from any source, searchable by ingredient or name in one place.
• Snap a photo of a handwritten recipe or cookbook page — AI converts it to a digital recipe automatically.
• Write your own recipes with the AI Recipe Assistant — no more forgetting steps or details.
• Organise into private folders by theme (chicken, desserts, gluten-free, breakfast…) and plan your weekly menus easily.
• Search by ingredient or recipe name and cook great meals with what you already have in your fridge or pantry. Save money, use your leftovers and reduce food waste.

DISCOVER RECIPES FOR EVERY MEAL
• Millions of home-cooked recipes from cooks around the world: chicken, salmon, pasta, pancakes, meatloaf, lasagna, chocolate chip cookies and much more.
• Quick & easy weeknight dinners or special occasions: BBQ ribs, apple pie, pork belly, scallops, morel mushrooms, rhubarb and more.
• Get inspired by cuisines from around the world: Spanish, Italian, Thai, Japanese, Chinese and more.
• Filter by diet: vegan, vegetarian, keto, gluten-free, BLW and more.
• Cooking tools and methods: air fryer, slow cooker, Instant Pot, bread maker and more.

SHARE YOUR COOKING
• Share recipes with friends, family or the Cookpad community — or keep them private, just for you.
• Upload cooksnaps (photos) of dishes you've made and share your experience.
• Follow home cooks and food creators from around the world.

JOIN MILLIONS OF HOME COOKS
• Connect with passionate home cooks worldwide and get cooking inspiration every day.
• Cookpad is for everyone — beginners to experienced cooks — for daily meals or special occasions.

COOKPAD IS AD-FREE
Enjoy a seamless, interruption-free cooking experience.

COOKPAD PREMIUM
Cookpad is free to download and use. With the optional Premium subscription you get:
• The most popular recipes at the top of search results.
• Save unlimited recipes from other home cooks.
• Advanced search filters to match your cooking preferences.

Cookpad Premium is available in: Arabic speaking countries, Argentina, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, France, Greece, Hungary, India (English only), Indonesia, Italy, Malaysia, Mexico, Poland, Romania, Spain, Taiwan, Thailand, Ukraine, United Kingdom, United States, Uruguay and Vietnam.

Get in touch: help@cookpad.com

Meet your new cooking coach! Over 3000 Tasty recipes now at your fingertips; an all-new Step-By-Step instruction mode; ‘My Recipes’ page which serves as your very own mobile cookbook, and an innovative Search tool that allows you to filter by any ingredients, cuisine and social occasion you’re in the mood for! 

FEATURES:
- Get step-by-step instructions on how to cook every single recipe. We’ll even keep your phone awake so you don’t have to worry about it falling asleep while you cook. 
- Watch the latest videos from Tasty before your friends do. 
- Get recommendations for your next meal based on the time of day, day of the week, and major holidays.
- Vegetarian? Personalize the app to automatically hide all recipes with meat! (Don’t worry, you can always change this later)
- Search recipes by social plans, ingredients, dietary needs, difficulty, speed, cuisine, and more.
- Filter by what matters to you like vegan, gluten-free, low carb, healthy, and comfort food to name a few. 
- Add recipes to your Tasty likes to save them for later.
- Live outside of the US? We have metric values side-by-side with US measurements for every recipe!

If you have any trouble with your app please email us at support@buzzfeed.com so we can help!

And don’t forget to check out Tasty on Facebook!

Please note: 
This app features Nielsen’s proprietary measurement software which will allow you to contribute to market research, like Nielsen’s TV Ratings. Please see www.nielsen.com/digitalprivacy  for more information.

If you’d like to delete your tasty.co account, log in and go to the user settings menu, then tap Delete User. Deleting your account will irreversibly delete all account information, including saved recipes and tips.  This will not unsubscribe you from any email lists you’ve signed up for; to unsubscribe, please follow the instructions at the bottom of the email.  This will not delete your account on other BuzzFeed platforms.  To delete your other accounts, please go to those platforms.

How many times have you found yourself looking for that perfect recipe – only to find that you’re missing one or more ingredients?

How many times have you opened the fridge and thought to yourself -- what can I make ?

How many times have you thrown away an ingredient, because you couldn't figure out how to use it before it expired ?

SuperCook to the rescue!

Unlike other recipe apps,  SuperCook only shows you recipes that require the ingredients you already have.  

All the recipes you see on SuperCook  are recipes you can make right now.  No more inconvenient grocery runs for a missing ingredient, at a time when you should be home, with your family and friends

Why purchase new ingredients when you can focus on what you already have?

Here’s how it works:
• For Supercook to do its magic, it needs to know all the ingredients you have at home.
• Visit the pantry page in the SuperCook app and choose from a list of 2000+ ingredients broken down into categories like fruits, vegetables, meats, and many more. 
• Start adding ALL the ingredients you have at home to your SuperCook pantry – including oils, spices, and yes - even that old bottle of Worcestershire sauce in the back of the fridge!
• Sit back and watch SuperCook work its magic by finding recipes that match your ingredients.

SuperCook’s Unique App Features:
 
--Customized Recipe Ideas--
We’ve consolidated over 11 million recipes from 18,000 recipe websites, in 20 languages to create the largest recipe collection ever.   This knowledge was fed into an AI system that learnt the intricacies of all ingredients and how they can be mixed together.

All you have to do is build your pantry on the app – and you’re ready to make delicious meals without ever leaving your house!

SuperCook will find you any recipe you need, whether it’s for breakfast, lunch, dinner, or even a midnight snack.  

--Easily Add Your Ingredients--
Save time and money with an intelligent pantry. SuperCook’s voice dictation mode allows you to quickly add ingredients to your in-app pantry by simply saying them out loud.

Just open your fridge, click the microphone button, and start listing everything inside. The app will automatically add the ingredients to your pantry for a quick and easy way to find recipes!
 
--Automatic Recipe Recommendations--
The app will automatically find you recipes to make with what’s in your fridge – so all those lost ingredients in the back of your cupboard now have a place on your table.  It’s that simple!

When you run out of an ingredient, simply open the SuperCook app and remove it from your pantry -  and all the recipe ideas will adjust accordingly.
 
--Get Creative in the Kitchen--
SuperCook inspires new ideas and activities in the kitchen for new cooks, busy parents, foodies, and pro chefs alike.

With over 11 million recipes available in 20 different languages, SuperCook promises that you’ll never cook the same thing twice (unless you want to, of course!).

--What's on the menu ?--
The menu page is where you'll find all your recipe ideas.  Why is it called menu?  Because just like the menu in a restaurant, everything on the menu page is available to you now.  SuperCook instantly analyzes 11 million recipes and finds the ones that match your unique ingredients.

Most likely your menu page will contain thousands of recipes, but don't worry, we've broken them down into helpful categories like soups and stews, appetizers and snacks, salads, entrees, desserts and more.

--Reduce food waste--
Most people don't realize how much food they throw away every day — from uneaten leftovers to spoiled produce. SuperCook is one of the best ways to reduce food waste in the home.   It finds recipes that use as many of your ingredients as possible, so nothing goes to waste.    SuperCook makes food waste prevention fun and easy, just open the menu page on the app and choose a recipe.   We help you use what you have, so nothing goes to waste!

Make everyday cooking easy and enjoyable with the Kitchen Stories app. Build your confidence in the kitchen with our step-by-step recipe guides, save time and collect your favorite recipes in personal cookbooks, and join a passionate community of millions of hobby chefs from around the world. Our award winning app is simple to use and has a wide range of over 10,000 recipes that will appeal to beginners and more experienced home cooks alike. Download our free app and create delicious meals that will impress everyone at home.

ENJOY EVERYDAY COOKING WITH KITCHEN STORIES
Get inspired each day by thousands of free food recipes, tips, and articles.

CREATE PERSONAL COOKBOOKS
Set up your personal profile and save your favorite recipes in personalized cookbooks.

EXPLORE COMMUNITY RECIPES AND SHARE TIPS
Dicover recipes from our community, upload photos of the dishes you’ve cooked and exchange cooking experiences with others in the comments section.

PRACTICAL COOKING TOOLS
Easily adapt ingredient measurements according to serving size, use our timers at each recipe step and enable cooking mode to be guided effortlessly step-by-step.

FIND THE PERFECT RECIPE
Thanks to our search feature, you’ll find the perfect recipe for your taste and nutritional preferences. Our recipe box offers a variety of tasty nutritious recipes for your kitchen. Learn how to cook vegetarian and vegan dishes, low-carb, gluten-free, and low-calorie options. From breakfast to dinner, you can count on our selection of crowd-pleasing tasty and healthy recipes – including weeknight favorites, seasonal twists on classics, trends and tastes from around the world. 

LEARN HOW TO COOK WITH OUR GUIDED RECIPE EXPERIENCE
Whether you’re a beginner or an advanced home chef, there’s always something new in our recipe box, with instructional HD recipe videos and tips from our expert team of editors and chefs. Activate ""cooking mode"" and let it guide you with easy-to-understand, step-by-step photos and instructions for each tasty recipe from the Kitchen Stories platform. Don’t forget to upload a photo of your dish and share it with our hungry community once it’s ready!

RECIPES FOR EVERY OCCASION
Is it everyday cooking you’re after, or is today a special occasion? Maybe you’re eating alone or making a tasty dinner for the entire family? Need a quick snack or help with planning a three-course meal with appetizers and dessert? We’ve got you: Our recipe box is packed with cooking and baking recipes. Browse by difficulty level and preparation time, plus use our handy measurement converter to adjust the measurements according to the desired servings. For easy, on-the-go planning, place all your recipes in easily manageable cookbooks.

DOWNLOAD OUR FREE APP TODAY
Download now and sign up for your free account to get started.

PRAISE FROM THE MEDIA
“Kitchen Stories offers up a free collection of recipes, which users can sort in different ways. The videos here are instructive and well produced, so you’ll be sure to get a clear picture of the recipe.” — Washington Post 

“Kitchen Stories is a cleanly-designed recipe guide app with step-by-step instructions that even a cuisine dunce would be hard-pressed to misinterpret.” — The Guardian

“Kitchen Stories offers inspiration and…prides itself on high quality, professional produced content.” — Forbes

---

Hungry for more Kitchen Stories?
We’re always open to ideas and feedback! Get in touch with us here: hello@kitchenstories.com

You can find our Terms of Use here: https://www.kitchenstories.com/en/terms/

Happy cooking!
Your Kitchen Stories Team

description: CookBook – AI Recipe Organizer & Meal Planner CookBook is the #1 AI recipe organizer and meal planner loved by thousands of home cooks. Keep every recipe, shopping list, and meal‑prep plan in one place, import dishes from Instagram, TikTok, or any website, track macros, and even order groceries with a tap. Start with a free 7‑day trial. IMPORT & CREATE • Import recipes from websites, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Pinterest and more • Scan photos of cookbooks or handwritten cards with the AI Recipe Scanner • AI Chef creates new recipes, variations, ingredient swaps, and generates dish images • Import straight from your mobile browser while you search for recipes • Safeguard treasured family favorites in your personal CookBook ORGANIZE & CUSTOMIZE • Ingredients in your method auto‑link to exact amounts for quick checks • Bulk‑edit tags, add tag images, and link related dishes • Powerful search by name, ingredient, nutrition, cook time, or dietary tags (vegan, keto, gluten‑free) • Pick from custom color themes and accessibility font sizes MEAL PLANNING & SHOPPING • Plan meals for a day, week, or month with the built‑in meal planner • Smart shopping list sorts items by aisle and syncs across all devices • Instacart integration lets users in the US and Canada order groceries with a tap • Plan ahead to cut food waste and stay on budget NUTRITION & GOALS • Macro calculator with custom targets and daily totals shown in the planner COOK WITH CONFIDENCE • Hands‑free voice guidance, built‑in timers, and keep‑awake screen lock • Effortlessly scale servings and convert units (US, Metric, Imperial, Australian) and temperatures automatically ANYTIME, ANYWHERE • Sync recipes across Android phones, tablets, and the CookBook Web App • Offline access keeps every recipe at your fingertips without a connection • Secure cloud backup and Google Sign‑In support EXTRA TOOLS • Duplicate checker, last‑cooked date, and cook count • Multiple photos per step and video links • Volume‑to‑weight converter and easy QR code sharing QUESTIONS OR FEEDBACK? We’d love to help – email team@cookbookmanager.com --- PRICING & TERMS CookBook is free to download. After 20 saved recipes and 20 smart imports, you’ll need an active monthly or yearly subscription - yearly includes one 7‑day free trial. Payment is charged to your Google Play account at confirmation and renews automatically unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the period. Manage or cancel anytime in your Google Play subscriptions. Unused portions of a free trial or subscription period are non‑refundable. Terms: https://www.cookbook.company/policies/terms Privacy: https://www.cookbook.company/policies/privacy

description:
SideChef’s 18,000 step-by-step recipes help you get from “what’s for dinner?” to cooking your next meal in just minutes. Filter by diet and preferences, search by ingredients, create a grocery list, and instantly shop ingredients on Walmart. Called “best app” by USA Today and the New York Times’s “favorite cooking app,” SideChef empowers you to eat healthier, save money, and live your most delicious life.
PERSONALIZED RECIPE RECOMMENDATIONS
Quickly find recipe inspiration tailored to your specific preferences. Filter by dietary requirements, allergies, food preferences, and ingredients you already have at home to find a recipe you like in less than one minute.
 
ONE-CLICK GROCERY SHOPPING
Easily create a grocery list, and shop ingredients directly from Instacart, Walmart, Amazon Fresh, Target, and many more of your favorite grocers . Ingredients are intelligently matched to in-store products, and updated with real-time prices and availability. Make smarter decisions by seeing the percentage of each ingredient used in a recipe – an easy way to plan for leftovers and minimize food waste, while also saving money.
 
GREAT FOR BEGINNERS
New to cooking? Our step-by-step recipes include an image or video at every cooking step so you know exactly what to do. Built-in timers ensure you never overcook anything again, while how-to videos teach you valuable culinary skills – from how to properly dice an onion, to how to press tofu. Rate recipes, upload photos, exchange tips, anad share cooking fails and successes with the SideChef home cooking community.
 
EASY MEAL PLANNING
Use our meal planning tool to select recipes for the week, or save appealing recipes to your cookbook. Browse thousands of curated recipe collections and meal plans for more inspiration and ideas on what you’ll cook next.
 
AUTOMATED CONTROL OF APPLIANCES
Remotely control your compatible smart appliances with 2,000+ CookAssist-enabled smart recipes. Compatible brands include: LG, GE, and Bosch Home Connect brands including Thermador and Gaggenau. Simply link your devices and start cooking.
 
RECIPES FOR EVERYONE
Personalized recipe recommendations for these diets and allergens: Vegan, Vegetarian, Pescatarian, Low-Carb, Paleo, Keto, Gluten, Egg, Dairy, Soy, Peanut, Tree Nuts, Fish, Shellfish
Recipes cover a variety of cuisines: American, Italian, Mediterranean, Mexican, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Indian, French, and more! Browse recipes from your favorite culinary influencers – top food bloggers, writers, and renowned chefs.

PRAISE FROM MEDIA
“Favorite cooking app” – New York Times
 
”Best App of 2017” – Google Play
 
“It’s not just recipes, it does everything for you” – The Today Show
 
”SideChef has become a game-changer in the crowded space of cooking apps” – Forbes
 
”Best Cooking App” – Tom’s Guide

OPTIONAL SIDECHEF PREMIUM SUBSCRIPTION
SideChef is free to download and use. Should you choose to upgrade to SideChef Premium, we offer an auto-renewing subscription option at a price of $4.99 USD / month or $49.99 USD / year.

By downloading and using this app or purchasing a SideChef Premium subscription, you are agreeing to the SideChef terms of use and service: https://www.sidechef.com/terms

For more information about how we use your personal data, please see our Privacy Policy: https://www.sidechef.com/privacy-policy. By downloading this app, you acknowledge the terms of our Privacy Policy.

description:
Everyone loves food. But cooking is usually considered as a special skill set reserved for a few! We are here to show you it's not true.

We believe anybody can cook. Cookd is your cooking buddy that helps you cook anything you like and discover more recipes to try. Here's how:

Discover recipes: Find recipes based on cuisines, mealtime, and 10+ other criteria. Our list of 600+ recipes is growing every day and we've got you recipe ideas whatever your preferences are

Cook with what you have: It's a situation where you'll find yourself mostly in. You have a few ingredients at home and you're thinking about what to cook with them. Just add the ingredients you have in the Cookd app and we'll suggest you some delicious recipes!

Cook easier: Problem with following a recipe video on Youtube? You need to pause, rewind, replay, etc., while your palms are not always available. Cookd's step-by-step recipe mode solves this problem. You can play each step in repeat mode till you complete them and just click a button for the next step!

Recipe customizable according to servings: Most of the recipes online are for a fixed number of servings. And you can't double all the ingredients if you want to cook for twice the number of servings! Our expert team has spent time making the recipes customizable. Just click the number of servings you need and we'll modify the ingredients accordingly

Meal planning: You discover a few recipes. You can make a meal plan out of it in Cookd app! Mark them for your upcoming days/week/month

description:
New York Times Cooking has thousands of quick recipes you’ll love to make, from easy weeknight dinners to holiday showstoppers. Editor-curated collections make it easy to find the right recipe, and helpful videos make them fun and simple to cook. With our digital Recipe Box, you can easily save favorites, plan a grocery list and organize the dishes you want to try. Each recipe in our collection is tested to make sure it’s accurate and delicious, every time. We publish new recipes and videos every day.

Subscribe to New York Times Cooking in the app, or if you’re already a subscriber, log in for unlimited access to our recipes and much more.

THE NYT COOKING APP INCLUDES:

DELICIOUS AND SIMPLE RECIPES
- Healthy, hearty, vegetarian or anything else: We have 30-minute dinner recipes for seamless meal planning.
- From morning muffins to desserts for a crowd, we have tried-and-true baking recipes for every occasion. 
- Our recipes include ratings, reviews and helpful tips from thousands of other home cooks.

COOKS YOU KNOW AND LOVE
- We have quick recipes and cooking videos from cooks you trust, including Samin Nosrat, Ina Garten and more.
- Plus, tips, tricks and demonstrations from our editors, including Melissa Clark and Eric Kim.

HELPFUL COOKING VIDEOS
- Follow step-by-step demonstrations and guides.
- Scroll through hundreds of short-form cooking videos to discover new recipes.
- Sit back and enjoy episodes of our longform shows, like Cooking 101 and The Veggie.

MEAL PREP MADE EASY
- Search our database of over 20,000 recipes by diet, cuisine, meal type and more.
- Save and organize the recipes you want to make each week in your Recipe Box.
- Add the ingredients to our built-in grocery list, or skip the hassle and order grocery delivery via Instacart.

EASY VIEWING
- Watch high-resolution cooking videos and photos on a larger screen.
- Keep multiple windows open for simpler cooking.
- Drag and drop simple recipes into folders in your Recipe Box.

BY DOWNLOADING THE NEW YORK TIMES COOKING APP, you agree to:
• The New York Times Privacy Policy: https://www.nytimes.com/privacy/privacy-policy

The number 1 recipe organizer. ReciMe saves all your favorite recipes in one place, including Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube and Pinterest. Create grocery lists and meal plans. Calculate calories for every recipe. However you cook, ReciMe helps you do it, better.

FEATURES

- Save Recipes from Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube and Pinterest – Download recipes from social media sites. The ingredients and method steps are saved in an easy-to-read format.
- Upload recipes from anywhere – Save your favorite recipes from your existing apps like Paprika, Notes app, Google Docs, Notion, Evernote, and more! Or add your own recipes.
- Grocery Lists – Create smart grocery lists to shop faster! Sort ingredients by supermarket aisle or by recipe.
- Order Groceries – Turn your grocery list into a delivery! Order directly in-app and get ingredients to your door.
- Meal Plan for the Week – Categorize meals for breakfast, lunch, or dinner.
- Nutrition Information – Calculate calories, protein, carbs, and fats for any recipe.
- Create Cookbooks – Organize your recipes into cookbooks. Customize recipes by meal type (breakfast, lunch, dinner), cuisine, diet, and more!
- Cloud Sync – All recipes are saved on the cloud.
- Access Across Multiple Devices – iOS and iPad.
- Adjust Ingredients – Scale ingredients to your desired serving size.
- Convert Measurements – Change recipe measurements between standard and metric.
- Cook with Ease – Keep your phone screen unlocked while you cook. Follow recipes step-by-step so you can focus in the kitchen.
- Share – Share recipes with your friends and family. Or send via email, SMS, WhatsApp, Messenger, or AirDrop.

HOW DOES IT WORK?

ReciMe includes both a free version and a subscription version with premium features.

The premium version allows you to:

1.	Download unlimited recipes from social media, and

2.	Upload unlimited images of recipes to our smart importer

3.     Calculate nutrition for every recipe

You can start a 7-day free trial to access these premium features. Unless you cancel at least 24 hours before the end of the free trial, you will be automatically charged the price indicated on the payment screen for your chosen subscription period. The ReciMe Premium subscription renews automatically at the end of each period (each month or year) until you cancel. Canceling your subscription means the automatic renewal will be disabled. However, you will still have access to all your subscription features for the remaining time of your then-current period. Note that deleting the app does not cancel your subscriptions.

Terms of Use: https://www.recime.app/terms-and-conditions

Privacy Policy: https://www.recime.app/privacy-policy

Have an idea to make your cooking experience with ReciMe better? Please reach out to us at https://recime.app/help

description:
Organize your recipes. Create grocery lists. Plan your meals. Download recipes from your favorite websites. Sync with all your devices.

Features

• Recipes - Download recipes from your favorite websites, or add your own.
• Grocery Lists - Create smart grocery lists that automatically combine ingredients and sort them by aisle.
• Pantry - Use the pantry to keep track of which ingredients you have and when they expire.
• Meal Planner - Plan your meals using our daily, weekly, or monthly calendars.
• Menus - Save your favorite meal plans as reusable menus.
• Sync - Keep your recipes, grocery lists, and meal plans synced between all your devices.

• Adjust - Scale ingredients to your desired serving size, and convert between measurements.
• Cook - Keep the screen on while cooking, cross off ingredients, and highlight your current step.
• Search - Organize your recipes into categories and subcategories. Search by name, ingredient, and more.
• Timers - Cook times are automatically detected in your directions. Simply tap on one to start a timer.

• Import - Import your recipes from other desktop and mobile apps.
• Share - Share recipes via email.
• Print - Print recipes, grocery lists, menus, and meal plans. Recipes support multiple print formats including index cards.

• Bookmarklet - Download recipes from any browser straight into your Paprika Cloud Sync account.
• Offline Access - All of your data is stored locally. No internet connection is required to view your recipes.

Free Version

All features are available in the free version of Paprika, except:

• You can only save up to 50 recipes.
• Paprika Cloud Sync is not available.

You can upgrade to the full version at any time (via in-app purchase) to unlock unlimited recipes and cloud syncing.

Other Platforms

Paprika is also available for iOS, macOS, and Windows. (Please note that each version is sold separately.)

description:
RECIPE KEEPER DIGITAL COOKBOOK WITH SEARCH, OFFLINE FUNCTION, GROCERY LIST & MEAL PLANNER

 Want a free recipe keeper and manager where there are also tools like grocery list maker and meal planner? Look no further than My Recipe Box, the all-in-one recipe book app designed to make your cooking journey seamless and delightful. With a wide range of powerful features, My Recipe Box is like having a digital cookpad that empowers you to take control of your recipes, streamline meal planning, and unleash your inner chef.

YOUR COOKBOOK

 🍽️ Unleash your culinary creativity by adding your own unique recipes to My Recipe Box. Create your recipe library and organize recipes with ease. Whether it's a treasured family secret or a newfound cooking triumph, keep all your creations in one place. 🌐 SEARCH OR IMPORT RECIPES FROM WEBSITES My Recipe Box has a search engine to easily find and import recipes from most cooking websites.. 🍳 ADJUST & CUSTOMIZE RECIPES Personalize your recipes by editing and customizing them to your liking with our recipe generator. Make notes, add cooking tips, and adapt ingredients to suit your taste using the recipe creator. 📚 INTUITIVE RECIPES ORGANIZER Organize your recipes effortlessly by categorizing them using this digital cookbook. Find what you need in seconds with sorting and filtering options that keep your recipe gallery collection tidy and accessible. Thanks to the different filters available (categories such as cake recipes baking recipes etc; ingredients; tags; favorite recipes), you will find recipes in a flash. 🔍 SEARCH BY INGREDIENT OR SHAKE PHONE TO GET RECIPE Wondering what to make with the ingredients you have on hand? Use the ingredient search feature to find recipes that match what's in your fridge, helping you reduce food waste and whip up delicious meals on the spot. Can't decide which recipe to use from the cook book? Shake your device; our recipes offline app will choose a recipe for you! 🔄 SHARE, BACKUP, RESTORE RECIPES Impress your friends and family by sharing your culinary masterpieces with just a few taps. Spread the joy of cooking! Also, keep your recipes safe with backup and restore options, and sync with Dropbox. 📝 GROCERY LIST AND MEAL PLANNER Simplify grocery shopping by making shopping lists directly from your recipes. No more forgotten ingredients or multiple trips to the store. Also, plan your meals with ease by scheduling recipes for the week ahead. Stay organized and make meal prep a breeze.

My Recipe Box, COOKBOOK RECIPES APP FEATURES:

• Add your own recipes • Import recipes from most cooking websites. • Edit your recipes & recipe notes • Sort and filter your recipes by category • Search by ingredients; finish the leftovers from the fridge! • Add favorite recipes & manage your own categories • Share your recipes by email • Backup and restore recipes • Create your shopping lists from recipe Ingredients • Change the quantities (automatically calculated) • Search by tags • Plan your recipes week by week • Sync with Dropbox Premium features : • Remove ads and watermarks • Export all your recipes in PDF, HTML • Sync with Google Drive, pCloud, WebDAV • Link your recipes Say goodbye to cluttered recipe folders and hello to a world of culinary possibilities at your fingertips. 📂 Download My Recipe Box for FREE!

The America's Test Kitchen app delivers the best-tasting, simple recipes, cooking classes, product reviews and more than 30 years of test kitchen discoveries! Access rigorously tested recipes from America’s Test Kitchen, Cook’s Illustrated and Cook’s Country.

Recipe collections feature recipes for every occasion: Grilling recipes, desserts, recipes by ingredients, simple weeknight recipes and each meal time: breakfast, lunch and dinner. Each recipe includes “Why This Recipe Works” and cooking tips, so you’ll know every test kitchen discovery. Save favorite recipes, cook great food and learn from the recipe app that has it all.

ATK Classes is an exclusive feature with expert-led cooking classes for all skill levels and personal connections with ATK instructors.

Download America’s Test Kitchen today and become a culinary master!

America’s Test Kitchen Features:

Browse Recipes & Save Favorites
- Recipe app with 14,000+ best-ever easy recipes
- Tasty recipes tested by test cooks & 70,000 volunteer home cooks
- Recipe Collections: weeknight recipes, seasonal picks, quick recipes & more
- Filter recipes by ingredient & dietary need: vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free & more!
- Recipes added every month & cooking articles added every day!
- Save favorite recipes, view recipe tips, customize with personal notes & get quick access on any device

ATK Classes!
- Focused, fun on-demand cooking classes taught by culinary experts
- Build your skills & refine your cooking intuition
- Cook along with helpful step-by-step visuals
- Enjoy a personal connection with instructors
- Classes for all skill levels

& More!
- Get Fresh Pick Recipe Recommendations based on your favorites
- Save money and time with 8,000+ rigorously researched product reviews & trusted kitchen reviews
- Find, compare, save recipes & share with others
- Quick-add all ingredients to your shopping list for every recipe so you’ll never forget anything again
- Cooking episodes from 42 seasons of our top-rated TV shows America’s Test Kitchen and Cook’s Country

Try out the entire app with a free trial
- Current ATK Essential members can access this app at no additional charge after logging in
- Access to the ATK app requires a monthly or annual ATK Essential membership, which also includes all the content across the America’s Test Kitchen, Cook’s Illustrated and Cook’s Country sites
- Bundle ATK Essential + ATK Classes and save!

Privacy Policy: https://www.americastestkitchen.com/guides/corporate-pages/privacy-policy
CA Privacy Notice: https://www.americastestkitchen.com/guides/corporate-pages/privacy-policy
Terms of Service: https://www.americastestkitchen.com/guides/corporate-pages/terms-of-use
Contact Us: support@Americastestkitchen.com

All subscriptions start at the end of the applicable free trial period. Free trials are only available upon an initial subscription. Payment will be charged to your Google Play account after your free trial period or at confirmation of purchase if you're not eligible for free trials. Subscriptions automatically renew each month or year 24 hours before the end of the current period and your credit card will be charged through your Google Play account unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period. You can turn off auto-renew at any time from your Google Play account settings. Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when you purchase a subscription to that publication, where applicable.

All products reviewed by America’s Test Kitchen are independently chosen, researched and reviewed by our editors. We buy products for testing at retail locations and do not accept unsolicited samples for testing. We list suggested sources for recommended products as a convenience to our readers but do not endorse specific retailers. When you choose to purchase our editorial recommendations from the links we provide, we may earn an affiliate commission. Prices are subject to change.

This casual mobile game is also a cooking game!
Enjoy cooking mania and fever, get ready to make food and open a restaurant or don't forget to work in a crazy kitchen! Are you ready for the madness of the crazy kitchen?

Do you love time management games, diner dash, and cooking? Or are you looking for a different food gameplay among the star chef, kitchen scramble, cook off and cake mania?
If so, this crazy kitchen is totally for you. You can be a creator of your own restaurant story and open a family style cafe or diner.  Immerse into the mania and fever of making food!

This restaurant game teaches you to make food & cook delicious burgers, good and great pizza and other popular street foods. Join this crazy kitchen with time management gameplay and simulation fun.

Experience the fun of time management!

Complete a diner dash before they leave the diner! Record your own restaurant story!

 FEATURES:
 - Enjoy gameplay, classic casual and time management games.
- Unlock advanced diaries, make food and become a star chef with mania and fever.
- Hundreds of fun levels: you need to cook good and great pizza, burgers, and sweet baked goods.
- Get combo streaks to earn big rewards.

https://matryoshka.helpshift.com/hc/en/8-cookinglive/

Sincerely, the Matryoshka Games team

Tired of cooking the same 3 meals on repeat? Zest integrates a mind-blowing cooking education into your routine. Learn to cook with us through step-by-step explanations of foundational cooking concepts in fewer than 10 minutes and dishes that bring the concept to life. Our recipes are created by two former Michelin star chefs, distilled by a home chef, and cooked by you, the superstar home cook that you are (or will be). We don't assume any prior culinary knowledge. We meet you where you are and help you improve.

Stop copying traditional recipes - start learning from Zest. We've cooked those delicious Bon Appetit dinners. But when we took away the recipes we felt like lost puppies. Zest is designed to teach you the how's and why's of cooking. So when the recipe is gone you can confidently navigate the kitchen. The promise: Taste improvement after one dinner with Zest.


FEATURES:


STEP-BY-STEP INSTRUCTIONS

We've all tried cooking a TikTok recipe. You rewatch the video 13 times to figure out what the hell is going on. Zest embeds videos throughout recipes so you can click into content when you need it. No more pausing and restarting. Learn at your own pace.


CONCEPT VIDEOS

Watch a short video on a new concept at your own pace and then cook recipes that reinforce what you've learned. We dive into topics like the science of tasting and the basics of seasoning, sautéing, roasting and more!


SKILL VIDEOS

Don't know how to dice an onion? Don't be embarrassed, we got you covered. Skill videos are linked in each recipe to guide you along, so you don't have to watch Gordon Ramsey on YouTube (we love his accent too).


CURATED MENU

Choose a menu to fit your preferences. Tired of wasting produce? Search for dishes including what’s already in your fridge. Got allergies? Compile safe recipes in your menu to find them when you’re ready to get cooking.


GROCERY LIST

Shop your menu with our automated grocery list. Plus, utilize our helpful tips while you shop. Don't know what a neutral oil is? We got you covered.


PERSONALIZED RECOMMENDATIONS

Rate the recipes you cook, so we can recommend similar ones.


Feedback? Technical Issues? Killer ideas you want to contribute to make our app better? Email us at support@zestapp.co. We're always here to help and would love to chef up new ideas together!

Never get caught off guard by the weather With Weather & Radar, you see the weather at a glance — with one WeatherRadar that brings rain, clouds, sun, lightning, fog, and temperature together on one map. Wondering if rain is moving in, the sun will break through, or a thunderstorm is building nearby? WeatherRadar shows how sun, rain, clouds, fog, thunderstorms, lightning, and temperature are developing now, over the next few hours, and up to 4 days ahead: minute by minute for short-term changes, for your local forecast in the US and around the world. Your weather for everyday life, travel, and plans • Weather for every plan: drive to work, walk the dog, go for a jog, take the kids to the park, camp, hike, fish, or plan a BBQ. • Watch live as rain, storm cells, clouds, lightning, fog, and wind develop, where they are moving, and what that means for outdoor plans — from pop-up thunderstorms to hurricane-season weather. • The 14-day weather forecast and daily forecasts help you plan outdoor activities, road trips, vacations, and game day weather. Everything you need at a glance From RainRadar and free 4-day WeatherRadar to temperature, wind speed, lightning tracker, UV index, and air quality index (AQI) — everything is clear, current, and easy to understand. The AQI view focuses on how pollution may affect your health. With the weather widget, you can bring your local weather, current weather, weather today, and daily forecast straight to your Home Screen. We keep you updated We monitor the weather around you and send weather alerts when a change matters for your day: severe storm alerts, thunderstorms, first snow, extreme heat, strong wind, or other significant conditions. No hype, no panic —just clear updates from our meteorologists so you know what is happening and what to consider next. Forecasts, observations, webcams For everyday planning and weather enthusiasts alike: get details for temperature, air pressure, wind speed, wind direction, humidity, rainfall amounts, and hours of sunshine. Check weather webcams, water temperatures where available, moon phases, and mountain weather and popular US ski regions with snow forecast and slope data for popular regions. 👉 You can also record and share videos of interesting weather near you with the Weather & Radar community. One look and you know what’s coming No guessing, no complicated menus, no digging through layers — just local weather, live radar view that updates in real time and forecast information on your app home screen and in WeatherRadar. Open the app and see what is happening outside right away. Now, in the next few minutes, and up to 14 days ahead. On the road Keep an eye on weather while you travel: see conditions around you, along your route, and at your destination—helpful for commutes, road trips, stormy drives, snow days, and weekend plans. Driving with Android Auto? Weather & Radar helps compatible users view weather information on the road. Send your questions and feedback to info@weatherandradar.com Weather & Radar. Your clear view of the weather.

description: Never get caught off guard by a sudden downpour again. Whether you're a daily commuter, an outdoor enthusiast, or a professional storm chaser — Weather Radar gives you high-definition NOAA radar data the moment you need it. Real-time storm tracking, hyperlocal forecasts, and severe weather alerts — all in one beautifully simple app built for instant clarity. 📡 LIVE HD RADAR & NOWCASTING Experience the power of a professional meteorological station on your phone. Our Doppler radar layers are updated every few minutes to ensure you are seeing the most current atmospheric conditions. • Precision Storm Tracking: Trace the path of rain, snow, and mixed precipitation in real-time. • Hyperlocal Rain Alerts: Our "Nowcasting" engine tells you exactly when rain will start and stop at your precise GPS location. • Advanced Data Layers: Monitor wind speed, humidity, UV index, and barometric pressure with 200+ meteorological parameters. ⚠️ SEVERE WEATHER SAFETY (NOAA & NWS) Stay ahead of dangerous conditions with official alerts. We prioritize speed, so you have the maximum lead time to find shelter. • Instant Push Notifications: Get critical updates for Tornadoes, Hurricanes, Flash Floods, and Extreme Heat. • Global Lightning Tracker: See real-time strikes within a 100-mile radius of your location. • Official Warning Polygons: Visualize NWS/NOAA watches and warnings directly on your interactive map. 🏕️ DESIGNED FOR YOUR LIFESTYLE Weather isn't just data; it's about your plans. Our app bridges the gap between complex science and daily utility. • 14-Day Extended Forecast: Plan your weekend hikes, outdoor weddings, or commutes with confidence. • Interactive Widgets: High-design home screen widgets give you live radar views at a glance. • Performance Optimized: 2026-ready code ensures high-definition tracking with minimal battery drain. 🌎 GLOBAL COVERAGE, LOCAL TRUST​ While we use world-class data from NOAA, the National Weather Service, and ECMWF, our focus remains on your backyard. Trusted by 10M+ users worldwide for accuracy and reliability. Join the community and download Weather Radar: Live Storm Map today—because your safety shouldn't be a guessing game.

Windy.com is an extraordinary tool for weather forecast visualization. It’s fast, intuitive, detailed and most accurate weather app trusted by professional pilots, paragliders, skydivers, kiters, surfers, boaters, fishermen, storm chasers and weather geeks, and even by governments, army staffs and rescue teams. Whether you are tracking a tropical storm or potential severe weather, planning a trip, pursuing your favourite outdoor sport, or you just need to know if it will rain this weekend, Windy provides you with the most up-to-date weather forecast around. The uniqueness of Windy lies in the fact that it brings you better quality information than the other weather apps’ pro-features, while our product is absolutely free and even without ads. Powerful, smooth and fluid presentation makes weather forecasting a real pleasure!

All forecast models at once

Windy brings you all the world’s leading weather forecasting models: global ECMWF, GFS and ICON plus local NEMS, AROME, UKV, ICON EU and ICON-D2 (for Europe). Furthermore NAM and HRRR (for the USA) and ACCESS (for Australia).

51 weather maps

From wind, rain, temperature and pressure to swell or CAPE index, with Windy you will have all convenient weather maps just at your fingertips.

Satellite & Doppler radar

Global satellite composite is created from NOAA, EUMETSAT, and Himawari. The image frequency is 5-15 minutes based on area. Doppler radar covers large parts of Europe, America, Asia, and Australia.

Point of interests

Windy lets you display observed wind and temperature, forecasted weather, airports around the World, collection of 55 000 weather webcams and 1500+ paragliding spots right on the map.

Fully customizable

Add your favorite weather maps to quick menu, customize color palette on any layer, access advanced options in the settings. All that makes Windy the weather geek’s tool of choice.

Features and data sources

✅ All leading weather forecast models: ECMWF, GFS by NOAA, ICON and meteoblue mLM ✅ Several local weather models NEMS, ICON EU and ICON-D2, AROME, NAM, HRRR, ACCESS ✅ High-Res satellite composite ✅ Forecast model comparison ✅ 51 global weather maps ✅ Global weather radar network with precipitation type ✅ 16 altitude levels from the surface to 13.5km/FL450 ✅ Metric or imperial units ✅ Detailed weather forecast for any location (temperature, rain and snow accumulation, wind speed, wind gusts and wind direction) ✅ Detailed Airgram and Meteogram ✅ Meteogram: temperature and dew point, wind speed and wind gusts, pressure, precipitation, altitude cloud cover ✅ Altitude and Time zone info, Sunrise and Sunset time for any location ✅ Customizable list of Favorite spots (with the option to create mobile or e-mail alerts for upcoming weather conditions) ✅ Nearby weather stations (Real-time observed weather - Reported wind direction, wind speed and temperature) ✅ 50k+ Airports searchable by ICAO and IATA, including runway info, decoded & raw METARs, TAF and NOTAMs ✅ 1500+ Paragliding spots ✅ Detailed wind, wave power and wave forecast for any kiting or surfing spot ✅ 65K+ Weather webcams ✅ Tide forecast ✅ Topographic maps by Mapy.com and Satellite imagery by Here Maps ✅ English + 40 other world languages ✅ Now with Wear OS application (Forecast, Radar, Tiles and Complication) ...and many more

Get in touch

💬 Join us at community.windy.com to discuss weather related topics or suggest new features. Follow us on social media • Facebook: facebook.com/windyforecast • Twitter: twitter.com/windycom • YouTube: youtube.com • Instagram: instagram.com/windy_forecast

description: Weather Forecast and Warnings - Meteored offers weather information and forecast for India. Meteored is the preferred weather app for weather enthusiasts. Our app features our own forecasts, weather alerts, and live radar, all powered by the world's best prediction model. Its modern design, inspired by Material Design, makes weather inquiries quick, easy and delivers accurate forecast and detailed local weather reports, such as forecast maps, rain radar, hurricane radar, 14-day weather forecast, atmospheric maps, weather warnings and alerts, air quality index, pollen levels, wind, weather radar and more. Meteored has over 20 years of experience in meteorology, climate, and forecasting. We won't let the weather surprise you. If you have a Wear OS device, you can check the forecast on your wrist. Check the weather, whether it's going to rain at your location or even add a map to your watch. ⚠️ WEATHER WARNINGS, ALERTS & NOTIFICATIONS Receive Official Weather Alerts from India Meteorological Department (IMD), National Disaster Management Authority of India (NDMA) and WMO CAP for your location in real-time thanks to our daily alerts. We provide warnings and notifications about every severe weather phenomena: rain, storm, extreme temperature, wind, hurricane, tropical storm, and much more. Receive all the weather alerts notifications nearby in your phone. 🌧️ WEATHER FORECAST - WEATHER REPORT Check the current weather as well as the forecast for the next 14 days. Tap on a day to see detailed hourly data such as air pressure, temperature, weather warnings, wind direction and wind speed, snowfall, rain probability, precipitation amount, feels-like temperature, humidity, UV index, sunrise and sunset hour, or even moon phases. You can also view air quality or pollen levels in your area. Rotate your phone to see the temperature trend of the weather with our charts. 🗺️ FORECAST MAP, RAIN RADAR & SATELLITE There is an animated weather map based on the model (ECMWF) with a forecast for the next 6 days. Layers for precipitation (rain and snow), temperature, air pressure, sea temperature, air quality, pollution, pollen count, etc. With the weather forecast maps, you can track all weather phenomena in your area. Enjoy our live rain radar and also our hurricane and storm tracker. Access the animation of the rain radar of the last hours and see satellite images, infrared, and water vapor images provided by NOAA. Check the Weather Alerts and Weather Warnings in the Weather Forecast Maps. 📰 WEATHER NEWS Read our daily news and articles to stay up-to-date with the weather and the latest meteorological events. Be informed about trending topics and the most recent weather forecast from our meteorologists. ▶️ WEATHER VIDEOS Discover videos of impactful weather phenomena, along with exclusive scientific content to help you understand the atmosphere and the weather. 📱 WIDGETS Customize your desktop with the most advanced weather widgets. You have up to 8 widgets in different sizes and with different information to check the local weather forecast! Temperature, rain, and more. 📍 AVAILABILITY Find the most relevant weather forecast to your current location or search for your favorite cities: Delhi, Bangalore, Mumbai... and others abroad. We have more than 6 million worldwide! ✉️ SHARE Share the weather forecast with your contacts via social networks. By using this app, you accept the terms of use of Meteored. SEVERE WEATHER ALERTS

INTERACTIVE MAPS

description:
MyRadar is a fast, easy-to-use, yet powerful weather app that displays animated weather radar around your current location, allowing you to quickly see what weather is coming your way. Just start the app, and your location pops up with animated live radar, with radar loop lengths of up to two hours.  This basic functionality provides the quickest way to get a fast snapshot of the weather on-the-go, and it's what has made MyRadar so successful over the years.  Check your phone and get an instant assessment of the weather that will impact your day.

In addition to the live radar, MyRadar has an ever-increasing list of weather and environmentally-related data layers that you can overlay on top of the map;  our animated winds layer shows a breathtaking visual representation of both surface winds and winds at the jetstream level; the frontal boundaries layer shows high and low pressure systems as well as frontal boundaries themselves; the earthquakes layer is a great way to stay on top of the latest reports on seismic activity, completely customizable as to severity and time; our hurricane layer allows users to stay on top of the latest tropical storm and hurricane activity throughout the world; the aviation layer overlays AIRMETs, SIGMETs and other aviation-related data, including the ability to track flights and display their IFR flight plans and paths, and the "wildfires" layer allows users to stay abreast of the latest fire activity around the United States.

In addition to the data layers, MyRadar has the ability to send weather and environmental alerts, including alerts from the National Weather Center, such as Tornado and Severe Weather alerts.  MyRadar includes the ability to receive alerts based off of Tropical  Storm and Hurricane activity;  you can configure the app to send you an alert any time a tropical storm or hurricane forms, or is upgraded or downgraded.

One of the most useful features in MyRadar is the ability to provide advanced rain alerts;  our patent-pending process for predicting hyper-local rainfall is the most accurate in the industry.  Instead of having to constantly check the app, MyRadar will send you an alert up to an hour in advance as to when the rain will arrive at your current location, down to the minute, including details on intensity and duration.  These alerts can be a life saver when you're on-the-go and don't always have time to check the weather - our systems will proactively do the work for you and let you know in advance before the rain hits.

All of the weather and environmental data represented on MyRadar is displayed on our custom mapping system, developed in-house.  This mapping system uses your devices GPU, which makes it incredibly fast and speedy. The map has the standard pinch/zoom capability which allows you to smoothly zoom and pan around the United States and the rest of the world to see what the weather is like anywhere on the planet.

In addition to the free features of the app, the premium upgrade is available, including real-time hurricane tracking - great for the start of hurricane season.  This feature provides additional data above and beyond the free version, including the cone of probability for tropical storm/hurricane forecast tracks, and also includes a detailed synopsis from the National Hurricane Center.  The premium upgrade also include the professional radar pack, which allows greater detail of radar from individual stations.  Users can select individual radar stations around the US, select the radar tilt angle, and also change the radar product being displayed, including base reflectivity and wind velocity - great for experienced weather buffs looks to stay on top of possible tornado formation.

MyRadar is also available for Wear OS devices, including tiles for both radar and current conditions - try on your smartwatch!

Don't get caught off guard with bad weather;  download MyRadar today and try it out!

Clime: NOAA Weather Radar Live is an all-in-one weather tracker right on your device.

Consider Clime your one-stop weather radar app. Keep current with important weather changes using real-time radar images, precipitation and temperature forecasts, customizable weather alerts, accurate weather maps, and more. Concerned about Hurricane Season? Stay ahead of it with the Hurricane Tracker. 

Take advantage of having accurate US radar data, like detected areas of rain, snow, and mixed precipitation, right on your phone. Use the radar map to check precipitation’s movement, and make your own predictions based on animated radar images for the last 40 minutes, up to the current time. Switch between the rain radar and other overlays in app settings, or customize the radar map by tweaking opacity of radar images and choosing the most convenient loop speed and background map for your radar.
 
STAY INFORMED
- Prepare for rain and snow with the 24-hr precipitation forecast
- View cloud cover as seen from space
- Bookmark multiple locations for easier navigation 

SEE THE DETAILS
- Today’s weather and 7-day local weather forecast
- Current, today’s min & max, and "Feels Like" temperatures
- Pressure, humidity, wind speed & wind direction, visibility weather, dew point
- Chance of precipitation
- Sunrise & sunset time

KEEP YOURSELF SAFE WITH A RELIABLE STORM TRACKER
- Receive push notifications and alerts for bookmarked locations (tornadoes, hurricanes, freeze warnings, storm alerts, and more)
- Monitor important National Weather Service watches, warnings, and alerts in the form of interactive polygons on the map 
- Need a tornado tracker? Clime delivers tornado warnings and watches to your fingertips

GO PRO WITH CLIME: NOAA WEATHER RADAR LIVE
- Alerts for all saved locations
- Hurricane & tropical storm tracker
- Precipitation forecast map for 72 hours
- Lightning tracker
- Temperature forecast map
- Rain alerts
- Fires & hotspots
- RainScope
- Hourly 14-day forecast with weather information
- Snow depth forecast
- Pollen data
- No ads

Need a real-time weather radar app? Make Clime your go-to storm radar! You’ll have storm radar in the palm of your hand! Clime uses radar data provided by the NOAA, so it’s like having an advanced weather station right on your smartphone. 

Radar coverage: radar images show the US (the radar is available for the Continental US, Alaska (except northern), Hawaii, Northern Mariana Islands and Puerto Rico), Mexico (northern), Canada (southern), Australia, many European countries, Japan, etc. See the full list of countries with the radar map available on the developer’s website.

Precipitation and temperature, snow depth forecast maps, as well as the satellite map and the weather forecast supported by precipitation alerts are available for most of the world. 
Hurricane tracking, wildfire, and lightning trackers are also available for most of the world.

NWS watches, warnings: the US only.
Governmental weather warnings: Australia, Austria, Belgium, Canada, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Ireland, Italy, Japan, Latvia, Luxembourg, the Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, the UK.

Subscription payments will be charged to your Google Play account at confirmation of your purchase. Subscriptions will automatically renew and you will be charged unless auto-renew is turned off or unless you cancel at least 24 hours prior to the end of the current subscription or trial period. Any unused portion of a free trial period will be forfeited when you purchase a premium subscription during the free trial period. The cost of renewal depends on the Subscription Plan you choose.
Subscriptions and auto-renewal may be managed by going to Account Settings after purchase or by contacting Customer Support.

Clime Weather Service, LLC is a part of Bending Spoons S.p.A.

Esta é unha aplicación profesional de predición do tempo que é gratuíta.

A aplicación mostra con precisión as condicións meteorolóxicas actuais na súa localización exacta, en calquera lugar do mundo. Ofrece detalles actualizados sobre a temperatura, a choiva, a probabilidade de precipitación, a neve, o vento, as horas de sol, as horas de saída e posta do sol.

A PREVISIÓN TEMPORAL E O TEMPO EN VIVO ofrece a previsión meteorolóxica máis precisa e fiable. Tamén ofrece os indicadores meteorolóxicos máis precisos, como as horas de saída e posta do sol, humidade, índice UV, velocidade do vento, calidade do aire e precipitacións.

🌞Tempo en tempo real
- Mostra a temperatura actual, a temperatura real, a icona do tempo, a velocidade e dirección do vento, a temperatura máxima e mínima

🌞Alerta meteorolóxica en directo e desastres naturais
- Mostra a área afectada, a hora de inicio, a hora de finalización, o resumo de avisos, o texto de aviso e a fonte de datos. As diferentes cores de advertencia representan diferentes niveis.
- Proporciona avisos de vento forte, choiva intensa, tormenta de neve e treboadas

🌞 Detalles do tempo de hoxe
- Proporciona temperatura corporal, horas de saída e posta do sol, humidade, raios ultravioleta, visibilidade, choiva e orballo, altitude, cobertura de nubes.

🌞Previsión do tempo para as próximas 24/72 horas
- Ofrece unha previsión meteorolóxica detallada de 24 horas, incluídas as previsións meteorolóxicas por hora

🌞Previsión do tempo para os próximos 10/25 días
- Proporciona temperatura diaria, resumo do tempo, humidade, índice UV, probabilidade de chuvia/nevada/xeo, probabilidade de raios, dirección do vento/velocidade/nivel do vento e hora do amencer/solpor.

🌞Minuto de choiva durante 2 horas
- Usa Rain Tracker para mostrar as precipitacións e nevadas minuto a minuto, así como a precipitación e o espesor da neve durante as dúas próximas horas

🌞Índice de calidade do aire
- Ofrece niveis de calidade do aire e recomendacións de viaxe. Os índices específicos inclúen PM10, PM2,5, monóxido de carbono, dióxido de carbono, dióxido de xofre, ozono e niveles de calidade. Tamén ofrece explicacións e recomendacións para os distintos niveis do Índice de Calidade do Aire. Ademais, mostra o índice UV e a información do índice de pole.

🌞Unidade de información meteorolóxica e configuración de formato
- Permite aos usuarios configurar a súa temperatura preferida, precipitación, visibilidade, velocidade do vento, presión, sistema horario e formato de data

🌞Mapa de radar meteorolóxico en tempo real
- Mostra un mapa de radar mellorado que inclúe cuberta de nubes, sol, choiva, neve, saraiba, treboadas e áreas de raios. Esta función permítelle ver ao instante as condicións meteorolóxicas de varios lugares. Ademais, permítelle seguir o movemento das nubes, as frontes meteorolóxicas e as tormentas activas para ver se afectarán ou evitarán a súa localización.

🌞Xestión de localizacións
- Permite aos usuarios engadir e eliminar manualmente cidades, axustar a orde das cidades, configurar notificacións e widgets para cidades e predicións meteorolóxicas. Tamén permite aos usuarios gardar calquera localización e ver as condicións actuais de calquera número de localizacións globais á vez.

🌞Widget e reloxo do tempo
- Ofrece un widget meteorolóxico que mostra a temperatura, a hora e a data actuais na súa localización actual. Tamén mostra información meteorolóxica sinxela, predicións diarias e horarias e actualiza as condicións meteorolóxicas.

🌞Notificación de predición do tempo
- Envía a información meteorolóxica máis importante todos os días, para que poidas estar informado sobre as condicións meteorolóxicas detalladas durante todo o día.

🌞Modo de visualización
- Permite aos usuarios cambiar libremente entre o modo claro e escuro.

🌞Soporte para varios idiomas
- A aplicación ofrece soporte na aplicación para máis de 100 idiomas.

weather forecast is a completely free weather app. It covers everything from minute-by-minute rain updates to 45-day outlooks, all in one place. Discover why users call it the weather app they trust the most. Whether you need a reliable local weather app or a comprehensive live weather app, we have you covered.

☀️Real-Time Weather 
Weather conditions update every minute. Always know what's happening right now with weather live. Experience the power of a true live weather tracking system.
☀️Minute-by-Minute Precipitation Forecast 
See exactly when rain or snow starts and stops, down to the minute, for the next 2 hours. Our precise forecast engine keeps you ahead of the weather.

View detailed weather changes hour by hour for the next 24 or 48 hours.

Plan weeks ahead with a long-range forecast covering the next 45 days. Check the weather for any upcoming events and stay prepared for long-term climate shifts.

Check real-time air quality index with health recommendations based on pollution levels.

Track tree pollen, grass pollen, ragweed, mold, and dust and dander levels. Know your risk before you head outside.

Watch live animated radar. Switch between rain, snow, cloud cover, wind, and temperature map layers. Powered by Windy, this weather radar provides professional-grade radar weather visualization, similar to a high-end radar scope. Track storms with our advanced radar rain and live radar layers, making it the ultimate weather radar app for your daily commute.

See expected snowfall amounts, snowfall start and end times, and ice probability. Get early warnings for hazardous winter road conditions using our highway weather feature.
