When severe storms approach, the built-in storm tracker and lightning tracker will monitor strikes in real time. Get instant tornado warning notices and utilize the tornado tracker to see damage paths. This storm radar capability acts as your personal stormwatch system, operating like an emergency weather radio to keep you safe.

Stay informed about seismic activity near you or anywhere in the world.

Check a full set of daily life indices: outdoor sports conditions, UV protection level, dust and dander risk, mold risk, and beach/surf conditions powered by our surfline data integration.

Read your daily horoscope alongside your weather forecast.

Auto-detect your current local weather. Add and monitor as many cities as you like. Switch between them instantly to check local weather anywhere.

Choose from 20+ weather widget styles. Customize background transparency, icon sets, and color themes. Compared to other weather apps, our customizable weather widget options give you total control. 
☀️Notification Bar 
Keep weather and radar features active in your background. Live weather radar live tracking keeps the temperature visible in your status bar at all times. With weather radar live data, there is no need to open the app.
☀️Customization
Choose your preferred units for temperature, wind, pressure, visibility, and precipitation. Explore multiple app themes, animated backgrounds, and icon styles to personalize your experience.

AccuWeather App Features:

Live weather radar with rain alerts, local forecast, and hurricane tracker. The most accurate radar map for Android - made for people who need accurate weather, right now. Going outside, planning a day out, flying a drone, or watching a storm approach? Rain Viewer shows the actual rain on the map. Data goes from radar to your screen in seconds - direct from the source, not a third-party feed. Our radar pipeline runs in millions of installs and feeds several major weather brands. The radar map you actually use:
  • Tap the map to see rain intensity at any point. Tap satellite for cloud top temperature. Tap an alert zone for the full advisory
  • Live indicator shows when you are seeing the most recent scan. New frames appear automatically
  • 48-hour history. 2-hour rain forecast updated every 10 minutes. 60fps vector map with precipitation arrows
  • Coverage in 80+ countries across the Americas, Europe, Asia (Japan, India, Thailand, China, South Korea), and Oceania
Hourly and 14-day forecast: Temperature, weather conditions, and chance of precipitation hour by hour for 72 hours. Wind direction and speed too, with units you choose: km/h, mph, m/s, knots, or Beaufort. Tap any day to see UV index, humidity, wind, sunrise, and sunset (Android only). Models: ICON, GFS, HRRR, ECMWF, and WRF-ROMS Thailand. Minute-by-minute precipitation: When rain is on the way, the forecast screen shows when it starts, peaks, and stops. Radar scan age: Tap the map to see exactly when each area was last scanned. Parts of a radar frame can be minutes apart, so the timing tells you whether to leave now or wait out the rain. Saved locations show freshness at a glance. Rain alerts you can rely on: Set custom alerts for your locations. Get national severe weather alerts from the US, most of Europe, Thailand, Saudi Arabia, and more. Set thresholds so you only get notified for what you care about. Hurricane and storm tracker: Get timed alerts that show exactly when a storm reaches you. Choose hurricane wind speed units: mph, km/h, m/s, or knots. AI Weather Insights: Our AI looks at the radar images near you and writes a short summary of what to expect in the next few hours. Like a personal meteorologist on your phone. Pro Radar (US + most of Europe, 22 countries): Doppler products on all tilts - reflectivity, velocity, spectrum width, and the differential measurements used by meteorologists. Weather widgets: Resizable radar widget and minute-by-minute rain widget for your home screen. Foldable support including Galaxy Z Fold. Privacy: No data collection. No data sales. Location is used only for local forecast and rain alerts. Free to download. Upgrade for the radar archive, AI insights, and Pro Doppler products.

INTERACTIVE WEATHER MAP

Zoom Earth is an interactive weather map of the world and a real-time hurricane tracker.

Explore the current weather and see forecasts for your location through interactive weather maps of rain, wind, temperature, pressure, and more.

With Zoom Earth, you can track the development of hurricanes, storms, and severe weather, monitor wildfires and smoke, and stay aware of the latest conditions by viewing satellite imagery updated in near real‑time.



SATELLITE IMAGERY

Zoom Earth shows weather maps with near real-time satellite imagery. Images are updated every 10 minutes, with a delay between 20 and 40 minutes.

Live satellite images are updated every 10 minutes from NOAA GOES and JMA Himawari geostationary satellites. EUMETSAT Meteosat images are updated every 15 minutes.

HD satellite images are updated twice a day from NASA polar-orbiting satellites Aqua and Terra.



RAIN RADAR & NOWCAST

Stay ahead of the storm with our weather radar map, which shows rain and snow detected by ground-based Doppler radar in real-time, and provides an instant short-term weather forecast with radar nowcasting.



WEATHER FORECAST MAPS

Explore beautiful, interactive visualizations of the weather with our stunning global forecast maps. Our maps are continually updated with the latest weather forecast model data from DWD ICON and NOAA/NCEP/NWS GFS. Weather forecast maps include:

Precipitation Forecast - Rain, snow, and cloud cover, all in one map.

Wind Speed Forecast - Average speed and direction of surface winds.

Wind Gusts Forecast - Maximum speed of sudden bursts of wind.

Temperature Forecast - Air temperatures at 2 meters (6 feet) above the ground.

"Feels Like" Temperature Forecast - Perceived temperatures, also known as apparent temperature or heat index.

Wet Bulb Temperature Forecast - Where people are at risk of heat stress.

Relative Humidity Forecast - How air moisture compares to temperature.

Dew Point Forecast - How dry or humid the air feels, and the point at which condensation occurs.

Atmospheric Pressure Forecast - The average atmospheric pressure at sea level. Low-pressure areas often bring cloudy and windy weather. High-pressure areas are associated with clear skies and lighter winds.



HURRICANE TRACKING

Follow hurricanes from development to category 5 in real-time with our best-in-class tropical tracking system. Information is clear and easy to understand. Our hurricane tracking weather maps are updated using the very latest data from NHC, JTWC, NRL, and IBTrACS.



WILDFIRE TRACKING

Monitor wildfires with our active fires and heat spots overlay, which shows points of very high temperature detected by satellite. Detections are updated daily with data from NASA FIRMS. Use in conjunction with our GeoColor satellite imagery to see the movement of wildfire smoke and monitor fire weather in near real-time.



CUSTOMIZATION

Adjust temperature units, wind units, time zone, animation styles, and many more features with our comprehensive settings.



ZOOM EARTH PRO

More features are available through auto-renewable subscriptions. Payment will be charged to your Google Play account at the confirmation of purchase. The subscription will automatically renew at the end of each billing period and be charged within 24 hours, unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. For further information, please read our Terms of Service.



LEGAL

Terms of Service: https://zoom.earth/legal/terms/

Privacy Policy: https://zoom.earth/legal/privacy/

description:
JioSaavn is India’s leading FREE music app, offering an extensive and exclusive library of 8 crore+ songs across 16 languages. Enjoy music you won’t find for free on any other app! Set your favourite tracks as JioTunes (callertunes) on your Jio number. Explore India’s top podcasts hosted by star podcasters!

With JioSaavn, experience India’s most versatile music and audio streaming app that serves multiple purposes:

Languages:
Hindi, English, Punjabi, Tamil, Telugu, Gujarati, Bengali, Marathi, Bhojpuri, Kannada, Malayalam, and more. Whatever your language preference, find it on JioSaavn!

Top Artists:
Explore every artist under the sun like Justin Bieber, Sid Sriram, Shreya Ghoshal, Jubin Nautiyal, Diljit Dosanjh, Ilaiyaraaja, Kumar Sanu, Michael Jackson, Alka Yagnik, and many more! Access music by your current favourites or all-time legends.

Genres:
Pop, Trending, Classic, EDM, Romantic, Bollywood Retro, Rock, Folk, Rap, Devotional, Remix, Indie to name a few! Find songs in all your favourite genres on JioSaavn.

Sing along to super hits like ‘Kesariya’, ‘As It Was’, ‘Peaches’, ‘Le Le Aayi Coca Cola’, ‘Summer High’, ‘Mayakama Kalakama’, ‘Bimbilikki Pilapi’, ‘The Warriorr’, ‘Macherla Niyojakavargam’, ‘Megharajana Raaga’, ‘Singara Siriye’, ‘Thallumaala’, ‘Dagdi Chawl 2’, ‘Obosheshe’, ‘Bas Kar Pagli’, ‘The Villagers’, ‘Kabootar’. Get accurate song lyrics and trivia in real time!

Listen to India’s most popular podcasts and audio shows across multiple genres and languages. Discover your new favourite show and explore our curations in multiple genres such as ‘Comedy’, ‘Film & TV’, ‘Religion & Spirituality’, ‘Ishq Wale Podcasts’, ‘Crime & Horror’, ‘Health & Wellness’; along with shows in several languages like English, Hindi, Tamil, and more. Top-rated shows include ‘On Purpose with Jay Shetty’, ‘Pyaar Actually’, ‘Woice with Warikoo’, ‘Get Sleepy: Sleep Meditation and Stories’, and ‘ZARA KHAUFF SE SUNO’.

Curated Playlists:
Experience our expertly curated playlists made for every mood and occasion. Listen to Now Trending Hindi, Best Of Romance Hindi, Fresh Tunes, Now Playing Pop, Gedi Shedi, Lub Ju, Pudhu Tunes, Top Kuthu, Kotha Tunes, Now Trending Telugu, Hosa Tunes, Premaloka, Puthuputhan Tunes, Now Trending Malayalam, Navin Tunes, Now Trending Marathi, Bhalobashar Gallery, Nrityer Taale, Now Trending Bhojpuri, Pyar Ke Jadu, Nava Tunes, Haryanvi Dance Hits. Tune in to addictive playlists in your language.

JioTunes:
Make your callers smile with a trending JioTune! Explore our selections of Top Hindi, Top English, Punjabi Hip-Hop, Tamil Romantic, and Top JioTunes 2022. Set JioTunes from your favourite films, whether Bollywood, Tollywood, or Kollywood. Entertain your callers with a peppy song before you pick up the phone!

Device Compatibility: Listen on Alexa, Chromecast, Google Home, Android Auto, Airplay, Sonos, and more!

JioSaavn Pro: Upgrade your music experience with JioSaavn Pro! Get access to extra features:
- Ad-free music
- Unlimited JioTunes
- Unlimited downloads
- High-quality audio
- Ringtone downloads
- Exclusive music and podcasts

Enjoy JioSaavn Pro with individual, family, or duo subscriptions on monthly and yearly plans. Sign up for a 30-day free trial and get access to JioSaavn Pro features for free! Jio users can listen to music and set JioTunes from JioSaavn on the MyJio app.

Looking for JioSaavn? You’re in the right place! Whether you search for jiosaavn, Jio Saavn, Jio Saavan, Jiosaavan, Jio saavan, jio tunes, or Jio caller tune, we’ve got you covered!

Stay Connected:

description: ------------------------------------ PLEASE READ THIS BEFORE INSTALLING 1. This app can organise and play only the local audio files which are stored on the internal storage or SD card. 2. Features: ✅ Multiple Queues Separate queue for each folder, album, artist, playlist. Resume previous queues from their last position anytime. ✅ Efficient UI, Easy navigation For fast and easy navigation we placed all important components of the app (like Main player, Queues, Folders, Albums, Artists, Playlists) in just one row. So you can access them with just 1-Tap! ✅ Tag editor+: Can edit tags and album-arts of multiple songs at once. ✅ Move/Copy songs, Rename folders directly in app. ✅ Create Synchronized Lyrics. ✅ Save Bookmarks and Notes. ✅ Add/remove a song to >1 playlist, from notifications, widgets and even from lockscreen ✅ Folder browsing 📁 2-types of folder structures: 1) Linear (all folders at once) and 2) Hierarchical(folders within folders) ✅ Powerful Equalizer🎚🎚🎚: Separate presets and settings for Speakers🔊, Headphones🎧, Bluetooth etc. ✅ Gapless playback ✅ 🎧Earphone controls🎧 Single click for pause/play. Double click for next and Triple click for previous song. On each press >=4 you can Fast-Forward the song. ✅ Embedded Lyrics + LRC support Supports offline lyrics embedded in audio file as ID3 tag. You can edit embedded lyrics from tag editor. Musicolet also support .lrc files for synced lyrics. (Note: Musicolet doesn't fetch lyrics automatically from internet. You have to manually write or paste lyrics in tag editor, if there is no embedded lyrics. It doesn't fetch lrc file automatically. For lrc files, You have to find lrc file from internet, put it in the same folder and rename to exactly match it with audio file name manually.) ✅ Sleep timers 2 types: 1) close app after hh:mm time or 2) close app after N songs. ✅ Add shortcuts of any album/artist/folder/playlist to your HomeScreen (Launcher) app. ✅ Stunning Widgets ✅ Lock Screen (with controls, Queue and Lyrics) ✅ 🚘 Android Auto support 🚘 From your 'Android Auto' enabled car, you can control music and access your playlists, queues, folders and whole music library. ✅🎉Change notifications appearance🎉 ✅ You can also enable Fast-Forward and rewind buttons in notifications from settings. ✅ Light and dark themes ✅ Backup and Restore Automatic and Manual backups. Restore settings, playlists, play-counts from any backup anytime on any device. And much more... 🚫No Ads🚫 Ad-free forever, for all users. 🤩 No internet permission, Completely offline Musicolet doesn't even use Internet permission (a.k.a. network access permission). (You can check this in 'App permissions' at the bottom of this description in Play Store.) Dedicated to Music lovers 🎶 all around the world. 🌎 Created with love ❤, lots of code and sleepless nights. description: Pulsar Music Player has long been one of the best music players on Android. It is an offline audio player without advertisements. Its gorgeous user interface matches every single detail of the material design guidelines. Pulsar contains almost every necessary feature to fulfill all of your musical needs including: gapless playback, lyrics display, crossfade, play speed adjustment, tag editing, last.fm scrobbling, Chromecast, voice command, Android Auto, equalizer, music visualizer, audio balance, ReplayGain, sleep timer, etc. Pulsar is the ultimate audio player on Android, with millions of downloads. It has been translated into 36 different languages. Key Features: ✓ Gorgeous user interface and animation with material design. ✓ Manage and play music by album, artist, folder, and genre. ✓ Smart playlists with most played, recently played, and newly added tracks. ✓ Automatic sync missing album/artist images. ✓ Fast search across albums, artists, and songs. ✓ Resizable home screen widget. ✓ Gapless playback support. ✓ Play speed adjustment. ✓ Crossfade support. ✓ Replay gain volume normalization. ✓ Built-in metadata tag editor (mp3 and more). ✓ Display lyrics (embedded and lrc file). ✓ Sava/restore playback position (useful for podcast and audiobook). ✓ Music visualizer rendering. ✓ Chromecast (Google Cast) support. ✓ Google voice commands support. ✓ Android Auto support. ✓ Disable car auto play on Bluetooth. ✓ Sound balance adjustment. ✓ Last.fm scrobbling. ✓ Various colorful themes. ✓ Free of advertisements. ✓ Sleep timer. Pulsar supports standard music file types including mp3, aac, flac, ogg, wav and etc. If you cannot find your music in Pulsar, please click the “rescan library” menu item from the action bar to rescan your device. What Amazon MX Player's Video Player Offers: 
Unmatched Performance: Amazon MX Player's Video Player unleashes the full potential of your device’s multi-core chipset, providing an impressive 70% boost in decoding performance. 
Advanced Gesture Control: With a simple touch, you can easily control various functions such as volume, brightness, zoom and pan, fast-forwarding, rewinding, playback speed adjustment, subtitle-based seeking, and even resize or reposition subtitles. 
Seamless multitasking: Multitasking has never been easier with Amazon MX Player. Amazon MX Player's android media player offers a fully customizable floating window and Picture-in-Picture mode, ensuring uninterrupted viewing.
Customization at its Best: Customization is at the heart of Amazon MX Player’s video player. Make it truly your own by customizing User Interface to fine-tuning of playback controls.

Superior Subtitle Support:
* SubRip(.srt) 
* SubStation Alpha(.ssa/.ass). 
* VobSub(.sub/.idx) 
* Text(.txt) 
* WebVTT(.vtt) 
* SAMI(.smi). 
* MicroDVD(.sub) 
* SubViewer2.0(.sub) 
* DVD, DVB Subtitles 
* MPL2(.mpl) - Teletext 

Amazon MX Player OTT provides:
Enjoy endless entertainment with Amazon MX Player, your ultimate video app for streaming everything from Bollywood blockbusters to international sensations. With over 200,000 hours of content, this web series app has something for everyone.

* International Dramas: Love international series? Explore the best Korean and Turkish dramas dubbed in Hindi like Day Dreamer, Golden Boy, A Miracle, & beyond.
* Top Web Series: From Hindi web series to regional hits in Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, dive into trending shows like Gutar Gu, Mitti, First Copy, and more.

Other Key Features of Video Player 
* HD Music Player: A stylish music player, crafted exclusively for audiophiles
* Night Mode: Enjoy watching videos in low light without straining your eyes in an amazing video player
* Equalizer/Bass Booster: Immersive audio experience by customizing the audio output with the built-in Equalizer and Bass Booster 
* Video Cutter: Trim your videos like a pro and share them with your friends 
* Local Network: Access and play files stored on your computer or NAS using Samba (SMBv2) protocol.

Required Permissions: 
Storage/All Files Access: Necessary to scan and access all media files and subtitles on primary and external storage, including those not supported by Android Media Scanner. 
Optional Permissions: Microphone: Required for voice search  
Bluetooth: Required to adjust AV sync based on Bluetooth latency.
MX Share: Camera and Location Required

description: About the Internshala app: Make your career dreams a reality with Internshala’s free internship & job search app trusted by 21Mn+ candidates and 300K+ companies. On the Internshala app, you can find internships and jobs that suit you best from a range of work from home, part-time, in-office, and international opportunities in the profiles of your choice. It guides you through the job and internship search process from the very beginning till you get hired and beyond! With its inbuilt ATS-friendly resume builder, versatile job search filters, and easy application process, you can increase your chances of landing your dream job. About Internshala: Internshala is an internship and job search platform helping college students and freshers get the best start to their careers. This career-tech platform provides students with their first real-world experience through paid internships, fresher jobs, and online courses in line with its vision of becoming a career super app for college students. Why Internshala is your go-to internship and job search app: ◾Offers a Hassle-Free Login: Register/Login with Internshala for FREE with your Google account or email ID and apply to internships and jobs anytime, anywhere. ◾Helps Build ATS-Friendly Resumes: Create an ATS-friendly professional resume in minutes and get noticed by recruiters. ◾Supports Quick Search via Advanced Filters: Search for internships and jobs using filters for preferred location, profile, experience level, mode of employment, and salary. ◾Provides paid internships: This internship search app provides only paid internships unless you choose to intern with an NGO or an NPO. ◾Provides Instant Job Alerts: Get instant job alerts on new internships and jobs posted on Internshala and never miss out on exciting opportunities. ◾Connects You with Global Opportunities: Gain global experience with international remote internships and earn up to ₹3 Lakh stipend. ◾One-stop solution for your career needs: The Internshala app saves you the trouble of downloading separate work from home job apps and part-time job apps. How to Get Hired on Internshala? ◾Login/Sign up on the app. ◾Browse through jobs or internships according to your preference. ◾Click on ‘View Details’ for complete information about the vacancy. ◾Click on ‘Apply Now’ and follow the steps prompted. Frequently Asked Questions 1. Who are the leading recruiters hiring on Internshala? Internshala is helping companies like Nykaa, PepsiCo, BookMyShow, Nestle, CEAT, Unilever, PhonePe, Spicejet, Xiaomi, Swiggy, Puma, Sony, boAt, Dunzo, Urban Company, and several others find the right employees. 2. Do I need to pay to apply for a vacancy on Internshala? No, not at all! Internshala is a completely free to use app for job seekers. You can easily create an account, build your resume, and apply for internships and jobs FREE of cost. 3. What kind of job vacancies can I find on Internshala? Internshala offers internships and jobs across 250+ profiles, including digital marketing, engineering, commerce, full-stack development, Python programming, cloud computing, accounting, sales, video editing, and more. 4. Does Internshala offer full-time jobs? Yes, Internshala is a job-seeking app where you can find work from home jobs, part-time jobs, and in-office jobs. 5. Can I find a job in my city through Internshala? Yes, you can find a job or internship in your city through Internshala. This job search app offers jobs throughout the country. You can work in any city you like or work from home. Download the Internshala app now and give the best start to your career. This app is only for people looking for internships or jobs. Please use our website to post jobs/internships if you are an employer. We would love to hear from you! Reach out to us at helpdesk@internshala.com.

description:
Free Meditation & Sleep Made Easy — Always Free. Join 4 million+ people finding calm with Medito, your pocket‑size studio for guided meditation, mindfulness courses, breathing exercises and sleep stories. No ads. No subscriptions. Pure daily calm. Medito’s meditations, mindfulness & breathing exercises are carefully created to enhance your overall wellbeing. Feel the difference in your daily wellbeing with just a few minutes of mindfulness & breathing exercises.

Meditation for Sleep

Medito, guided meditation and mindfulness app, offers everything you need, from rain sounds to white noise, sleep stories to sleep meditations, for a stress & anxiety free sleep for your well being. It also offers bedtime stories for adults. Why Medito? • 100 % FREE & non‑profit – built by Medito Foundation to make mindfulness accessible to everyone. • Courses for every goal – quick daily calm, focus boosts, anxiety SOS, mindful walking, loving‑kindness and more. • Sleep stories & sounds – rain, ocean, white noise and narrated tales that turn screens‑off into lights‑out. • Personalised programmes – 7‑day starter, 30‑day challenges and advanced packs for any situation. • Offline mode – download any session and practise anywhere, anytime. • Evidence‑based – a 2024 RCT proved regular Medito use boosts wellbeing (Remskar et al., 2024). • Background audio – keep meditating or listening to sleep sounds with your screen off or while multitasking Here’s what Medito offers for sleep: • White noise • Nature sounds: rain sounds, ocean sounds • Sleep stories • Sleep meditations • Bedtime stories for adults • Breathing exercises Sleep stories are crafted to soothe mind before bedtime. Let our sleep stories calm your mind and help you fall asleep faster. Medito, guided meditation and mindfulness app, aims to increase users’ well being by offering guided meditation and mindfulness courses.

Mindfulness

Start your day with focused breathing to bring clarity and calm into your routine. Short breathing sessions are available anytime you need to reset. How our Mindfulness app works - Pick a mood or goal (Calm, Sleep, Focus, Anxiety relief). - Choose a length – 3 to 30 mins. - Press play, breathe, enjoy. • Track your streaks & get gentle reminders • Meditation packs for Students, Sleep, Anxiety, Stress, Well being and more • Dark‑mode friendly design Install Medito now – unlimited free guided meditations in under a minute. Contact hello@meditofoundation.org Twitter / Instagram @meditoapp Learn more at meditofoundation.org

Headspace is your guide to mental health, mindfulness, and meditation. Access guided meditations, mindfulness tools, therapy for anxiety, mental health coaching, and Ebb, your AI companion for meditation and sleep support. Manage emotions and anxiety, and follow your mental health journey with hundreds of meditations to meditate, sleep better, reduce stress, practice breathing exercises, and use relaxation techniques for anxiety relief and everyday wellbeing.

Headspace supports mental health and emotional wellbeing with online therapy, mental health resources, meditation tools, and daily mindfulness practices. Meditate, practice mindfulness, relax with calming routines, and build healthy habits that support balance, self care, sound sleep and overall welllbeing.

🧘‍♂️ DAILY MEDITATIONS & MINDFULNESS
Boost mental wellness and mindfulness with over 500 guided meditations. Meditate daily and make meditation a steady practice with 3-minute mental resets or longer mindful meditations. Build habits for stress and anxiety management, letting go of stress, and supporting mental wellness with relaxation, breathing techniques, meditation tools, and self care practices. Learn mindfulness for anxiety and explore calming guidance that fits your routine to support wellbeing.

🌙 SLEEP MEDITATIONS & RELAXING SOUNDS
Enjoy better sleep with soothing sounds, relaxing music, calming sounds for sleep, and guided sleep meditation. Drift off with bedtime soundscapes and gentle breathing techniques. Explore meditation for sleeping to reduce stress, support sleep quality, and ease anxiety and insomnia with relaxation exercises designed for sound sleep and stronger wellbeing to meditate.

🌬️ STRESS RELIEF & BREATHING
Experiencing anxiety? Meditate, relax, and manage stress with breathing exercises, guided meditations, and AI-powered mental health coaching. Learn breathwork and calming breathing techniques for stress relief, improve stress management, reduce stress, practice meditation for anxiety, and explore daily sessions for emotional balance.

👥 MINDFUL COACH & MENTAL HEALTH AI
Headspace gives you access to licensed therapists, mental health tips, coaches, and Ebb, your empathetic AI companion. Get AI support on how to manage stress symptoms, improve stress management, understand depression signs, navigate anxiety or panic, and explore CBT for depression.

💖 SELF-CARE
Explore self care practices for wellness. Empower yourself with tools to avoid burnout, manage anxiety symptoms, and improve stress management. Get guidance for emotional distress with mindfulness practices and routines that help maintain balance and improve wellbeing.

🚀 WELLNESS & BALANCE
Increase balance with guided meditation, breathing tools, and focus music. Calm your mind with quick breathing exercises, relaxation music, and mindful meditation for emotional clarity. Use a self care tracker to follow your mental health journey, develop healthy habits, and maintain everyday wellbeing while managing stress and anxiety.

💪 MINDFUL MOVEMENT
Try yoga for anxiety and stress relief, and mindful movement to strengthen your mind-body connection and support better sleep. Meditate and practice CBT techniques to overcome negative thoughts, reduce stress, and support consistent relaxation and balance.

Headspace is the everyday mental health app that supports anxiety, sleep, meditation, mindfulness, stress relief, and wellbeing. Access AI-powered mental health tools, mindfulness exercises, guided sleep meditation, breathing techniques, and relaxation practices for better sleep, anxiety and stress management, and healthier habits for mental health and happiness.

Access online therapy through your organization.* (Check coverage with your coach or benefits team.)

Start your free trial and explore meditation, mindfulness, mental health therapy, and sleep support. Subscriptions: $12.99/mo, $69.99/yr (U.S. pricing; local rates may vary). Charges apply at purchase confirmation.

description:
Calm is the #1 app for sleep, meditation and relaxation. Manage stress, balance moods, sleep better and refocus your attention. Guided meditation, Sleep Stories, soundscapes, breathwork and stretching exercises fill our extensive library. Practice self-healing and discover a happier you through Calm.
 
Feel better by reducing anxiety, prioritizing your self-care and choosing a guided meditation session that fits within your busy schedule. Introduce mindfulness and breathing exercises into your daily routine and experience their life-changing benefits. Meditation novice or seasoned expert, Calm is for anyone who is looking to improve their sleep and address everyday stress.
 
Sleep better with Sleep Stories, bedtime stories that lull you into a restful slumber. Relaxing sounds and calming music also help you meditate, focus and sleep soundly. Balance your mood and improve your sleep cycle by picking from 100+ exclusive Sleep Stories, narrated by well-known talent like Cillian Murphy, Rosé, and Jerome Flynn. Meditate daily to relieve anxiety and learn to put your personal health first.
 
Take a deep breath and find your Calm.
 
CALM FEATURES
 
MEDITATION & MINDFULNESS
* Meditate with seasoned experts, regardless of your experience level
* Be mindful in your daily routine and learn to calm your thoughts
* Mindfulness topics include Deep Sleep, Calming Anxiety, Focus and Concentration, Breaking Habits and so much more
 
SLEEP STORIES, RELAXING MUSIC & SOUNDSCAPES
* Sleep soundly listening to Sleep Stories, bedtime stories for adults and children alike
* Tackle insomnia with calming music, sleep sounds and full soundscapes
* Self-care: Sleep content to help you relax and get into a state of flow
* Relax and experience deep sleep with new music added every week, from top artists
 
ANXIETY RELIEF & RELAXATION
* Stress management and relaxation with daily meditation and breathing exercises
* Self-healing through Dailies - Reduce anxiety with daily 10-minute original programs like the Daily Calm with Tamara Levitt or the Daily Trip with Jeff Warren
* Mental health is Health - Tackle social anxiety and  personal growth through inspiring stories
* Self-care through mindful movement: Relax your body during the day with Daily Move
 
ALSO FEATURING
* Emotion and mental health tracker through Daily Streaks & Mindful Minutes
* Feel better with 7- and 21-day mindfulness programs for beginner & advanced users
* Soundscapes: Nature sounds and scenes to calm your nerves
* Breathing exercises: Find peace and concentration with a mental health coach
 
Calm is free to download and use. There are never any ads and some of the programs and features are free forever. Some content is only available through an optional paid subscription. If you choose to subscribe, payment will be charged to your Google Account at confirmation of purchase.
 
Be sure to check out our Wear OS app with tiles to quick-start breathing exercises and complications that help you track meditations.

What is Calm?
Our mission is to make the world a happier and healthier place. Through our website, blog, and app—filled with meditations, sleep stories, music, movement, and more—we’re redefining what mental health care looks like in 2021 and beyond. With over 100 million users worldwide, 100,000 new users daily, and our growing partnerships with major companies, we’re having a positive effect on more and more people each day.
 
Calm is recommended by top psychologists, therapists, mental health experts, and the press:

* “I’m generally wary of meditation apps because they sometimes weave in too much mystic talk for my taste. But Calm instead contains guidance like ‘Concentrate on your body’” - New York Times

* “In the frenetic, crazy, digital world we live in, sometimes it's necessary to take a step back and smell the roses” - Mashable
 
* “Eliminating distraction...ended up helping me relax and realize that all the stuff I was stressing about wasn't that big a deal” - Tech Republic

description:
Get support for whatever 2026 brings and build habits for lifelong mental health. Enhance your mental health, reduce daily anxiety and stress, improve your sleep, and increase focus with the Balance Meditation and Sleep app.
Balance is a personalized program, like having a personal meditation coach in your pocket. You answer daily questions about your meditation experience and goals, and Balance assembles guided sessions that are perfect for you using a vast audio library of sounds, meditation music, and breathing exercises.

LEARN PRACTICAL DAILY MEDITATION SKILLS
Balance's meditations are organized in 10-day Plans that teach concrete meditation skills to improve your mental health and achieve your goals. You'll discover how to bring mindfulness and meditation into your daily life, increase your focus among distractions, improve your sleep, reduce anxiety, and find deep relaxation as you learn to breathe deeply to reduce anxiety and stress, accompanied by soothing white noise audio and other relaxing sounds.

CALM YOUR MIND ANYTIME, ANYWHERE
Balance's Singles are stand-alone guided meditations you can use anytime. Wake up gently with a morning meditation, relaxation music, or stretch with calming sounds. Then, enjoy your commute with personalized audio guidance and get to work with a library of focus music. You can breathe through animated breathing exercises to clear your mind or lower your stress, reduce anxiety, find energy, and increase your focus with quick Relax, Energize, and Concentrate daily guided meditations. No matter where you are, you can take a moment to breathe and regain balance.

SLEEP WELL WITH BEDTIME RELAXATION EXERCISES
Rest easy with Balance's sleep meditations, sleep stories, sleep sounds such as white noise audio, sleep music, and wind-down activities. These first-of-its-kind interactive features use bilateral stimulation and controlled breathing to help your mind relax before bed, overcome anxiety, and find more restful sleep.

ENHANCE YOUR MEDITATION PRACTICE
If you're a beginner, you'll start with our Foundations Plan, which trains your focus and reduces anxiety. If you already meditate often, you'll start with our Advanced Plan, which helps you take your daily meditation practice to the next level. With guided breathing exercises, you can breathe intentionally, expand your meditation skills, and build a routine that works for you.

WHAT'S INCLUDED
- Personalized guided meditations tailored to your mood, goals, experience, and more
- 10-day Plans to help you develop and deepen your meditation skills for better mental health
- Bite-sized Singles for a calming boost
- Research-backed activities and calming sounds to help you relax, reduce stress and anxiety, and get restful sleep
- Animated breathing exercises to help you breathe deeply and find calm
- 10 concrete meditation techniques to build your practice: Breath Focus, Body Scan, and more
In meditation, "one-size-fits-all" fits no one. We all have unique ways of finding relaxation, focus, rest, and happiness. Balance's audio-guided sessions help you develop mindfulness and deepen your breathing to reduce anxiety and find calm.
SUBSCRIPTION DETAILS
Balance offers two auto-renewing subscriptions at $11.99/month and $69.99/year. These prices are for United States customers; pricing in other countries may vary.
Your subscription will automatically renew at the end of each subscription term unless auto-renewal is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the term. Subscription renewals cost the same as the original subscription, and your credit card will be charged through your Play account at confirmation of purchase.
Balance also offers a Lifetime subscription paid for by a one-off upfront payment of $399.99, which includes unlimited access to the Balance library forever.
For additional information, please read our Terms of Service (http://www.balanceapp.com/balance-terms.html) and Privacy Policy (http://www.balanceapp.com/balance-privacy.html)

Your Mental Health Companion:

With hundreds of mindfulness meditation apps to pick from, what makes Meditopia so special? Well, unlike most of the other options, Meditopia offers more than just a short-term solution to falling asleep, finding balance and de-stressing; we offer each member over 1000 deep-dive meditations and breathing exercises that get right to the heart of what we as a people, regardless of age, background, or experience, are dealing with everyday.

These meditations, offered in 12 languages, aim to cover the entire spectrum of human experiences from relationships, expectations, acceptance, and loneliness, to our body-image, sexuality, life purpose, and feelings of inadequacy. Meditopia doesn’t just want to be a band-aid for wounds which we know require permanent healing. Our goal is to create a mental health sanctuary in which you can access the guidance and tools you need to build up mental resilience, calm, balance, a healthy headspace and peace of mind. Everything you need to feel happier, relax, and sleep like a baby.

Download now and try a free meditation!

What can you get with Meditopia?

Sleep Meditations + Breathing exercises
Your quality of sleep affects almost every aspect of your daily life. So why not help yourself get better sleep? Try any one of our +30 sleep meditations to learn new techniques as well as breathing and visualization exercises that you can continue to practice throughout the rest of your life to promote good sleep. Say bye to that old sound machine and that one-function breathing app.

Bedtime Stories
Bedtime fairy stories aren’t just for kids! As you tuck yourself into bed, all warm and cozy, let us lull you to sleep with our wide selection of bedtime stories. From fairy tales and adventures to experiences in places all throughout the world, feel yourself getting pulled into these vivid and soothing stories. After all, at the end of a long day, you deserve to gently ease into a dreamworld of sleep and recovery. We also have a wide library of sleep sounds like rain, waves, and relaxing noises like white noise and more..

Our Top Features:
+1000 guided meditations
Nature sounds with a timer
Daily Meditations on a new topic every day
Daily Inspirational Quotes
Personal Note-taking to track your progress
Mindful Meter to see your mindfulness stats at a glance
In-app challenges with friends to feel challenged
Custom reminders to sleep and meditate
User-friendly and user-oriented interface


Meditopia’s meditation library offers over 1000+ guided meditations on topics including:
Stress
Acceptance
Compassion
Gratitude
Happiness
Anger
Self-Confidence
Motivation
Focus
Sexuality
Breath
Body Positivity
Change & Courage
Inadequacy
Self-Love
Less Guided Meditations
Body Scan
White Noise

To help you relieve stress, stay focused, relax with mindfulness, and better sleep at nights, Tide allows you to get away from the fast-paced life, and enter into peaceful and calm moments.

- Support to add apps into whitelist.

#More#
1. Tide Diary: Remember each calm and peaceful moment
- Visible data report. Record your beautiful moments in Tide.
- Fine-designed sharing card remembers each peaceful experience.

2. Minimalist Design: Pursuit of less is more

description:

Our wellness & sleep therapy sessions offer guided mindfulness & meditation, daily motivation, guided sleep sessions and coaching by world-renowned experts, personalized for the way you live your life. description: Simple design. Easy to use. A very straightforward approach to guided meditation; no clutter, no distraction. Just choose a track and hit play. It’s as simple as it can get. Variety of content. A curated list of guided meditation tracks catering to a wide variety of topics to suit your situation; including anxiety, body scan, healing, sleep and many more. Short as well as long meditation tracks. Take a quick break from your routine with meditation tracks as short as 5 minutes; or recharge yourself thoroughly with meditation tracks lasting over 40 minutes. Selective downloading. With offline support. Save your phone's storage space by downloading only the meditation tracks that you would listen to. Once downloaded, listen to them even when you are offline. No ads. No sign ups. Ads and sign-ups do the opposite of relaxing and calming the users; and that is not what we want you to experience. A clean interface to help us keep the experience soothing for you.

Meditation App for Sleep, Stress & Anxiety Relief - Free Guided Meditations & Sleep Music

Guided meditations, sleep music & mindfulness exercises to relax, focus, and sleep better. The number 1 free meditation app led by top experts from Stanford, Harvard, and the University of Oxford. Join over 35 million users on Insight Timer to calm the mind, reduce anxiety, manage stress, and sleep deeply. With 100+ new guided meditations and sleep tracks added daily, more meditation is practiced on Insight Timer than anywhere else. A leading mindfulness app for beginners and experienced practitioners alike. Music & Relaxation Find relaxing music for sleep, sleeping music, and meditation music designed for deep rest and focus. Explore relaxing sleep music, sleep sounds, and sleeping sounds on this powerful sleep sounds app. Stream relaxing music for sleep, ambient sounds, and sound sleep tracks — completely free. Stress Relief App - Anxiety & Mindfulness Insight Timer is a top stress relief app and mindfulness meditation app. Use guided meditation for anxiety, deep breathing exercises, and mindfulness practices for a calm mind and daily wellness. Browse popular topics: • Sleep deeply • Dealing with Anxiety and Reducing Stress • Getting through Recovery and Addictions • Self-love and Compassion • Focus and Concentration • Leadership • Better Relationships • Loving-Kindness Join 20,000+ leading meditation teachers and musicians including: • Ram Das - Stanford and Harvard University teacher • Mooji - devotee of Ramana Maharshi • Jack Kornfield, Dartmouth, co-founder of the Insight Meditation Society alongside fellow Insight Timer teachers Sharon Salzberg, and Joseph Goldstein of Columbia • Sarah Blondin, Ajahn Achalo, Melissa Ambrosini and many more.. Paid Feature - Insight Premium Meditation We have one optional in-app subscription. • 1,000+ Courses - Help you sleep better, feel happier, and less stressed • Listen offline (Listen to meditation and sleep music offline) • Advanced Player (Repeat, Fast forward and Rewind, Pick-up where you left off) • High-Quality audio Download the free meditation app and start your mindfulness journey today.

description: Breathe mindfulness, peace and restful sleep into your life. De-stress, be happier & healthier with over 1700 guided meditations, soothing music, nature sounds, inspirational talks and much more from leading experts in their field. Recommended by People & InStyle. Can’t sleep? Choose from a wide variety of content to help you get the restful sleep you need. You'll find premade sleep music playlists, nature sounds, guided meditations tracks, sleep stories, hypnotherapy sessions, calming videos, breathe techniques and more. Deal with life’s challenges with guided meditation series, inspirational talks and masterclasses from mindfulness coach Lynne Goldberg & New York Times best-selling personal growth experts. Main Features ¥ Relaxation Music and Sleep Sounds Hours of carefully selected nature melodies to help you relax, meditate, focus & sleep more soundly. ¥ Calm Music Playlists for various moods and occasions and the ability to create your own playlists. ¥ Sleep Stories and sleep meditations narrated to lull even the most hardcore insomniacs into a night of deep sleep. ¥ Bedtime Visualizations and guided imagery to absorb healing and positive messages while falling asleep. ¥ Guided Meditations Hundreds of series for whatever you’re dealing with in your life and to get you into a calm headspace. ¥ Alarm clock & morning meditations to start your day on the right foot. ¥ Learn to Meditate with a 12-week daily program and progressively bring more calm and clarity into your life. ¥ Inspirational talks and masterclasses from some of the greatest personal growth teachers of our time to become more peaceful and help you enjoy your life better. ¥ Hypnotherapy Sessions to help you tackle life’s challenges and to fall asleep easily for those who still have trouble sleeping. ¥ Breathing Exercises and calming videos you can use to learn how to breathe deeper and calm down in a few minutes. ¥ Free version with lots of free meditations on many subjects for as long as you want, or unlock all content with a Premium Membership! Bring more happiness, and peace of mind into your life with soothing music, short meditations, calming videos and breathe exercises you can use anytime, anywhere. Check out https://blog.breethe.com/ for info on the health benefits of mindfulness such as reducing anxiety, chronic insomnia & burnout. - Contact us at support@breethe.com. - For more info, consult https://breethe.com/more/terms-and-conditions/ Copyright © 2015 OMG. I Can Meditate! Inc.

Aura: Meditation & Sleep, CBT is a premier meditation and self-help app for better sleep, stress relief and self-improvement. It provides personalized guided meditations, mindfulness life coaching, CBT (Cognitive Behavioral Therapy), breathwork, soothing sleep sounds, sleep stories and much more. Aura is an all-in-one app that offers daily meditations, CBT, hypnosis on subjects like better sleep, stress, anxiety, depression, insomnia, motivation and more topics for any situation. Learn mindfulness, choose guided meditations and take breathing exercises led by top coaches. ** Featured on: The New York Times, Forbes, The Oprah Magazine, Women’s & Men’s Health, and more.** With a global community of 7 million users, a 98% user satisfaction rate, and advanced personalization, the Aura mobile app is the trusted choice for daily mental health, motivation, self-help, and self-care, all achievable in just 3 minutes a day. WHAT YOU GET WHEN YOU DOWNLOAD EXTENSIVE CONTENT LIBRARY: Access to the world's largest premium wellness library. The content is divided into categories such as meditation, sleep, anxiety, breathwork, ASMR, affirmations, happiness, and more. There is a large collection of self-care relaxing sounds: rain sounds, soothing sleep sounds, nature sounds, white noise, calming sea, and more. EXPERT GUIDANCE: Content led by top motivational, mindfulness and insomnia coaches, therapists, and storytellers from around the world. Receive effective self-help & motivational guidance from daily meditations to cognitive behavioral therapies (CBT). Enjoy live sessions or schedule your activities at your preferred time. BETTER SLEEP: Meditations for sleep, sleep sounds & stories, cognitive behavioral therapies for insomnia (CBT-I) and relaxing sounds to promote restful & better sleep. BREATHWORK: Take breathing exercises with a coach at a guided session or take one of our offline breathwork courses. PROGRAMS: Explore subjects deeply and effectively with the following pre-designed programs: - Sleep Meditation, - Calm Anxiety, - Stress Relief, - Hypnosis for Sleep, - Intro to Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT). - Cognitive Behavioral Therapies for Insomnia (CBT-I), and more. GRATITUDE JOURNAL: A tool for self-help, self-reflection and gratitude, which can have a positive impact on your mental health. Manage stress, anxiety, and depression by focusing on positive aspects and self-care of your life. MOOD TRACKER: A feature to help you become more aware of your moods and emotions, allowing you to visualize your progress over time. WHY MILLIONS OF PEOPLE USE AURA? Daily Wellness Habit: An easy-to-follow, daily self-help routine that takes just 3 minutes a day to help you relax, become more mindful and motivational, and enhance your mental health with Aura: Meditation & Sleep, CBT. Stress and Anxiety Relief: On-demand resources to reduce stress and anxiety, providing guided meditations, relaxing sounds, life coaching to find positivity and calm. Personalization: Aura has the world's most advanced personalization engine powered by the latest research in machine learning. It offers highly personalized content and recommendations to each user's specific needs and preferences, making it a valuable and relevant resource to improve your mental health. Сonstantly Updated Content: With a vast library of content spanning guided meditations, life coaching, CBT, and more. Supportive Community: Join a passionate community of 7 million users worldwide who love Aura and benefit from its offerings. Download Aura: Meditation & Sleep, CBT and get access to a world of personalized mental wellness resources, including guided meditations, life coaching, and CBT. Privacy Policy: http://www.aurahealth.io/privacy-policy

description:
Feeling overwhelmed or stressed in your everyday life? Want to feel more balanced and more joyful?

Enjoy a more restful sleep, stress less, and reduce your anxiety together with The Mindfulness App. With over 400 guided meditations and courses from experts around the world, we have options for every mood, time of the day, and for everyone from beginners to experienced.

• Guided meditations and courses in over 10 different languages.
• Sleep Stories for a gentle closing of the day.
• Personalised users statistics. 
• Personalised reminders to help you remember to meditate.
• Reminders based on time and location.

If you find that you enjoy a silent meditation, or simply want to include a personalized meditation into your practice, you can pick and choose between:

• 3-99 minute meditations. 
• Option of silent or guided.
• Inclusion of bells and a guided introduction. 
• Sleep Stories for a gentle closing of the day.
• Different background sounds such as forest, rain, waves and more.
• Possibility to save your favorites for quick access. 

As a new user, you have the option to take advantage of our Free Trial that allows you to test the app and access all premium content for a full seven days. 

Included in our Premium Subscription:
• Unlimited access to all meditations and courses in over 20 different topics. 
• Make meditations and course sessions available offline.
• Regularly updated content allows you to discover new favorite meditations and teachers.

You have the option to try all of the Premium content now with a one-week free trial.

We’re here to help you find what meets your needs and make meditation work for your daily life to improve your inner well-being. 

We want to be a part of your mindfulness journey, making it possible to meditate wherever you may be!

Mo is the #1 app for sleep, meditation and rest. Experience the benefits of lower stress levels and a sound, restful sleep by joining our community of 3 million happy users!

Our courses are recommended by numerous psychologists and therapists who recognize regular meditation as an effective tool for promoting mental health. Based only on well-established principles, our programs are tailored to address specific mental health needs.

Mo is the perfect choice for beginners, with initial lessons lasting just four minutes. We believe in the importance of establishing a daily meditation routine, even if the session is brief. And with consistent practice, you’ll be able to gradually extend the length of your sessions and progress to more advanced meditations.

Think bedtime stories are just for kids? Think again! At Mo, we believe that everyone can enjoy the soothing power of a good bedtime story. Our expert narrators will guide you into a deep and restful sleep, leaving you feeling rejuvenated and refreshed. It works like magic!

Our library contains 200+ meditation lessons and is continually growing. With fresh content every week, you'll always find something new to explore. Some of our most loved meditations include:
– Antistress
– Concentration and Productivity
– Sleep Meditation
– Personal Relationships
– Happiness and Gratitude
– Self-Esteem

Our free basic course will introduce you to the theoretical principles of meditation and provide some practical exercises to try out. You'll start feeling the positive effects after just one week (and that's guaranteed). Download the app now to get started!

“I get sound and restful sleep with Mo” — Anne, 36 years old, kindergarten teacher

“Meditation and anti-stress methods are fundamental in times of crisis” — Alexander, 40 years old, director

“This app is similar to Calm or Headspace but in my native language, I love it!” — Kate, 19 years old, psychology student

Children’s Sleep Meditations is a calming bedtime app designed to help children relax, unwind, and drift into a peaceful night’s sleep. With soothing bedtime stories, guided sleep meditations, and gentle relaxation exercises, this app supports healthy sleep routines for children of all ages.

If your child struggles with bedtime, anxiety, worries, or settling at night, these calming sleep meditations can help them feel safe, relaxed, and ready for sleep.

🌟 Bedtime Stories and Sleep Meditations for Children
This app includes a growing collection of children’s sleep meditations and bedtime stories, professionally recorded with gentle voices and relaxing background music. Each session is designed to calm the mind, relax the body, and support deep, natural sleep.

Children can listen at bedtime, during quiet time, or whenever they need to relax and feel calm.

😌 Helps With Sleep, Anxiety, and Calm

Parents use Children’s Sleep Meditations to help with:
• Children’s sleep and bedtime routines
• Night-time anxiety and worries
• Relaxation and calming down before bed
• Confidence, self-esteem, and emotional balance
• Mindfulness and gentle breathing for children

The app encourages relaxation through storytelling, guided imagery, and simple breathing exercises that children can easily follow.

🎧 High-Quality, Child-Friendly Audio

All recordings are professionally produced with dreamy music, soothing sound effects, and calm, reassuring voices. The meditations gently guide children into a relaxed state, helping them feel comfortable, content, and ready to sleep.

New bedtime stories and sleep meditations are added regularly, with additional content available through in-app purchases.

• Suitable for boys and girls of all ages
• Easy-to-use, child-friendly interface
• No ads or overstimulating visuals
• Ideal for bedtime, naps, and relaxation time

Whether your child needs help falling asleep, calming anxious thoughts, or simply winding down at the end of the day, this app offers a peaceful, screen-friendly bedtime solution.

✨ Download Now

Create a calmer bedtime routine and help your child sleep peacefully tonight with Children’s Sleep Meditations.

description:
Struggling to get the kids to sleep? Allow these relaxing Sleep Stories, Guided Meditations and purposely-designed Sleep Meditations to get your little ones off to a perfect nights rest.

With over 25 Million YouTube views our Meditations and Sleep Stories are being used by Parents, Teachers and Therapists all over the world to help children!

“I love this more than words can say and plan to share it with our community in my monthly newsletter in September. THANK YOU!!! xo Suzanne, Founder, Generation Mindful ‘and you even feel quite floppy...’ =) ...my favorite line.”

Suzanne Tucker
Founder Generation Mindful

Join us on our journey to restful Sleep and Happy Minds with over 100 pieces of completely original Sleep Stories, Guided Meditations and Sleep Meditations with new content added weekly.


Benefits of Meditation & Sleep Stories for Kids
—————————————————————
 - Improved Sleep
 - More Relaxed
 - Stress Relief
 - Anxiety Aid
 - Build a Calm & Peaceful Inner Life
 - Expanding the Imagination
 - Increased Focus & Attention
 - Parents reclaim precious time in the evenings


Key Features of Our App
————————————
 - Kid Friendly: Zero Advertisements
 - Proven and Trusted Creators
 - Over 100 Audios and rising!
 - Categories for Sleep, Meditation & Stories (with a message)
 - Updated Weekly Content
 - Used by Parents, Therapists & Teachers Worldwide
 - Create Playlists of your favourite Meditations
 - Download option to watch content offline




The App is separated into three separate categories, all with their own special benefits:


SLEEP
————
The audios in this category are purposely-designed Sleep Meditations and Stories. They are very calm and relaxing and usually lead the child gently into peaceful Sleep. Perfect as part of a bedtime routine.

Example Audios: The Sleep Train, Sleepy Cottage, In The Night Forest


GUIDED MEDITATIONS
————————————
These Meditations are often used in the Classroom and tend to use Mindfulness and other techniques & practices to work on particular subjects such as anxiety, confidence, gratitude etc.

Example Audios: The Gratitude Tree, Shine Your Light, Mindfulness Breathing Exercise


STORIES
—————
These Stories are used for entertainment, relaxation and also part of a bedtime routine. The stories whisk your child off to mystical far-off lands from flying with unicorns to riding on dinosaurs!

Example Audios: Land of the Unicorns, Fairy Land, The Magical Wizard


We are dedicated to creating new and interesting fresh content for your child and we hope the whole family can enjoy our App!

If you like our work we would really appreciate it if you could rate us. Alternatively, if you have any issues please don’t hesitate to send us any feedback and we will work on improvements for future updates.


SUBSCRIPTIONS

description:
Soundscape - Sleep Sounds, White Noise, Calm & Meditation App.
Can't sleep? Mind won't quiet down? 
Soundscape is the ultimate sleep, meditation & ambient sound app built to help you find deep calm, restore balance and wake up feeling genuinely rested. 
Stream sleep sounds, white noises, binaural beats & immersive soundscapes to finally get the better sleep and mental balance you've been always searching for.

Sleep Better - Every Night - Stay Happier.
Fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer with Soundscape's deep sleep sounds library. From white noise and brown noise to rainfall, ocean waves and forest ambience,  every sleep sound is crafted to guide your mind into a calm, restful state. Add guided bedtime stories to your sleep routine and wake up restored. If you've tried apps like Calm or Headspace for sleep and wanted something more focused on pure sleep sounds and ambient audio, Soundscape delivers a dedicated sleep experience without the clutter.

Meditation For Every Level.
Soundscape is a meditation app designed for real life - 5 minutes before work, 10 minutes at lunch, or a full 30-minute deep meditation session before bed. Meditate with layered ambient soundscapes, binaural beats and calming tones that ease anxiety, sharpen focus and restore inner balance. Whether you're new to meditation or have meditated for years, Soundscape's sound-first approach makes every meditation session feel effortless and deeply restorative.

Find Your Calm, Restore Your Balance.
True mental balance starts with being calm and calm starts with the right sound environment. Soundscape helps you balance your mood, reduce daily stress, and improve mental health through consistent, science-backed sound therapy. Use ambient soundscapes to calm a racing mind, binaural beats to shift into a meditative state, or white noise to create a focused, calm workspace. Creating balance isn't a destination,  it's a daily practice and Soundscape makes it accessible every day.

White Noise & Ambient Sounds For Deep Focus.
Block distractions and enter your flow state with white noise, pink noise and layered ambient soundscapes for study and deep work. Students, remote workers, and creators rely on Soundscape as their go-to noise app for having calm, focused sessions. Unlike generic  noise apps, Soundscape lets you blend and customize ambient sounds into a personalized soundscape that fits your exact focus needs.

Key Features:
• Sleep Sounds - White noise, Brown noise, Rain, Ocean, Nature & More.
• Binaural Beats For Deeper Meditation, Calm-State, Focus & Better Sleep.
• Ambient Soundscapes For Study, Work, Meditation & Relaxation
• Guided Bedtime Stories - Calm Your Mind & Improve Sleep Quality
• Breathing Exercises To Reduce Anxiety, Restore Calm & Find Balance
• Custom Sound Mixer - Layer Sleep Sounds, White Noise & Ambient Tones.
• Sleep Timer - Relaxation Fades Out Gently As You Drift Into Deep Sleep.
• Offline access — Your Sleep Sounds & Meditation Tracks, Always Available

Your Daily Calm & Balance Ritual.
Start your morning with a calm meditation. Power through your afternoon with ambient focus sounds. Wind down at night with sleep sounds and white noises. Soundscape brings balance to every part of your day, the way the best meditation and sleep apps should. Improve your mental health, find your calm and build the balanced daily routine you deserve.

Sleep better. Meditate deeper. Feel calm. Find balance.
Download Soundscape,  the sleep sounds, white noise & meditation app for total calm and daily balance.

Relax Melodies is now BetterSleep. New name, same great app.

→  Editors’ choice on Google Play

Sleep better. Feel better.
BetterSleep helps you understand and improve your sleep with sleep tracking, premium sleep sounds and guided content curated just for you.  

Recommended by leading doctors, neuropsychologists, and sleep experts, BetterSleep is also validated by millions of users around the world. 91% of our listeners say they slept better after using the app for just one week.

Here’s how:

Premium audio content
Fall asleep easily, sleep soundly, and develop lasting sleep habits, with dreamy soundscapes, narrated stories, and meditations that really work, all perfectly tuned to your needs.

Sleep tracker
Track your sleep, understand how it works and let us propose actionable ways to improve it. 

Sleep science
Learn about the science behind your unique sleep needs and discover your personal chronotype.

Many sleep apps offer tracking and nothing more.

BetterSleep offers an unprecedented suite of features to help you create nightly habits to fall asleep and stay asleep:

🌖 Sleep sounds, brainwaves, and white noise:
Explore our selection of more than 300 soothing sounds, music, beats, and tones designed specially by our in-house experts to guide you to sleep. Mix them together to create your very own soundscapes.

Our library includes:
– Nature sounds: wind, rustling leaves, birds, crackling fire
– White noise: hair dryer, airplane, dryer, vacuum, fan noise
– Water sounds: rainstorm, ocean, slow waves, lapping water
– Meditation music: voices, instruments, ambient melodies
– Isochronic brainwaves: 2.5Hz, 4Hz, 5Hz, 8Hz, 10Hz, 20Hz
– Binaural beats: 2.5Hz, 4Hz, 5Hz, 8Hz, 10Hz, 20Hz
– Solfeggio Frequencies: 174Hz, 285Hz, 396Hz, 417Hz, 432Hz, 528Hz

🌖 Sleep Moves

– Together: Unwind with this relaxation routine for couples

description:
🧘 Experience tranquility and enhance productivity with our all-in-one relaxation, sleep, meditation and focus app 🍀. Serene is an award winner candidate with highest quality content and innovative features.

 💁‍♀️ Feeling stressed? Suffering anxiety? Need a moment of calm? Struggling to concentrate? Can't sleep at night? Serene has got you covered! Immerse yourself in a world of serenity and mental well-being right from your device. 

🎧 Dive into a world of serenity with a vast collection of soothing music, sleep sounds, and meditation frequencies. Boost your work efficiency with calming lo-fi tunes. Discover your inner peace and unlock peak performance today!

🎵 Relaxation Music: Delve into a diverse collection of soothing melodies, from classical to sentimental, guitar to piano. Find the perfect soundtrack for your moments of tranquility.

💤 Sleep Better: Drift off effortlessly with calming tunes tailored to improve your sleep quality. Explore baby lullabies, white noise and nature sounds like ocean waves, rain, birdsong, and crickets to create your ideal sleep environment. Now you can personalize your sleep environment even further by adding trickling water or calming rain mixed to your favorite melodies.

📖 Stories: Discover the magic of sleep with our app's enchanting sleep stories. Whether you're tucking in your little ones or winding down after a long day, our carefully crafted tales are designed to lull both kids and grown-ups into a peaceful slumber.

😴 Best sleep experience with narrative-driven experiences that combine soothing voices with calming storylines, often set in tranquil settings or involving gentle, dreamlike journeys

🌿 Nature Sounds: Bring the outdoors inside with an array of immersive nature sounds. Listen to the soothing rhythm of the ocean, gentle rain showers, chirping birds, and peaceful animal sounds.

🌆 Ambiences: Set the perfect mood with ambient sounds, whether it's the hum of an airplane, the comforting white noise of a fan, or the warmth of a crackling fire. Experience ultimate relaxation with our collection of ASMR sounds, designed to soothe your mind and calm your senses.

🧘‍♂️ Meditation Sounds: Enhance your meditation practice with Tibetan singing bowls, healing frequencies inspired by Nikola Tesla, and planet frequencies that resonate with your inner self. Explore guided meditation sessions suitable for all levels. Enhance mindfulness, reduce stress, and sharpen your mental clarity.

🧘‍♂️ Guided Meditations: Find inspiration for daily meditation routines and experience transformative moments of clarity and relaxation. Introduce mindfulness into your daily routine and learn to calm your mind. Enjoy a range of focused practices that cater to various wellness needs.

🎧 Boost Focus: Unlock your inner potential with focus-enhancing exercises. Achieve more and worry less.

Join thousands of users who have found their inner peace through Serene.

✔️ Play and Customize Playlists: Now, not only can you play existing playlists, but you can also create and customize your own. 

✔️ Add background sounds: Mix a soothing water stream sound with a piano melody or blend bird sounds with a relaxation tune to create your perfect ambiance.

✔️ Easy navigation: Access your preferred content effortlessly with new, easy-to-use category buttons and our robust search function to find your favorite tracks quickly.

✔️ Growing library: Explore our daily growing content library, now featuring guided meditations and captivating sleep stories, designed to transport you to a world of dreams. Enhance mindfulness, reduce stress, and sharpen your mental clarity.

🕊️ Serene is your personal haven for peace and productivity, offering a world of sonic tranquility at your fingertips. Let the power of sound guide you towards a calmer, more centered self. Download Serene today and embark on a journey of serenity and self-discovery.

About this app A Life-Changing Approach to Mindfulness—Learn More than Basic Relaxation Methods Recognized as a 2025 Pick by NYT Wirecutter Featured as a 2026 pick for the App Store “App of the Day” Thousands worldwide call Waking Up life changing. Whether you want better sleep, more clarity, or deeper meditation, Waking Up is your complete guide. Testimonials “Waking Up has led to my most consistent meditation practice. Family and staff also use it because it’s such a powerful tool.” —Andrew Huberman, neuroscientist “Waking Up is a critical part of my daily practice. It’s my go-to for presence, peace, and well-being.” —Rich Roll, athlete & author “If you’ve had trouble getting into meditation, this app is your answer!” —Susan Cain, best-selling author What’s Inside • Introductory Course—a transformative 28-day program, for both beginners and experienced meditators • Daily Meditations—regular guided sessions with Sam Harris • Moments—short reflections when you need them most • Daily Quotes—a spark of insight each day • Reflections—brief lessons that shift perspective • Sleep—talks and meditations to help you rest • Meditation Timer—customize your own sessions • A vast library of meditations, theory sessions, life courses, conversations, and Q&As • Community—connect with members to discuss meditation, philosophy, psychedelics, and more Why Waking Up Stands Out Unlike conventional meditation apps, Waking Up blends practice with theory—so you not only learn to meditate but also understand how it transforms your mind. It’s meditation, science, and timeless wisdom in one place. Topics & Techniques Our library combines contemplative traditions with modern science, offering tools for both practice and understanding. Techniques include mindfulness (Vipassana), Loving-Kindness, body scans, yoga nidra, and nondual awareness practices from Dzogchen, Zen, and Advaita Vedanta. Topics span neuroscience, psychology, Stoicism, ethics, psychedelics, productivity, and happiness. Content & Teachers Created by neuroscientist and best-selling author Sam Harris, Waking Up features leading voices in meditation, philosophy, and psychology. • Practice—Vipassana, Zen, Dzogchen, Advaita Vedanta (Joseph Goldstein, Diana Winston, Adyashanti, Henry Shukman, Richard Lang) • Theory—the philosophy and science of consciousness, ethics, and well-being (Alan Watts, Charlotte Joko Beck, Joan Tollifson, James Low, Douglas Harding) • Life—mindfulness in relationships, productivity, Stoicism, and more (David Whyte, Oliver Burkeman, Matthew Walker, Amanda Knox, Donald Robertson, Bob Waldinger) • Conversations—Sam Harris with Yuval Noah Harari, Michael Pollan, Morgan Housel, Roland Griffiths, Cal Newport, Shinzen Young • Q&As—Sam Harris with Joseph Goldstein, Adyashanti, Henry Shukman, Jack Kornfield, Loch Kelly And many more subjects and teachers. Created by Sam Harris Neuroscientist and best-selling author Sam Harris built Waking Up as the resource he wished he’d had when he began meditating 30 years ago. Every practice, course, and teacher is chosen for its power to change lives. Free for Anyone Who Can’t Afford It We never want money to be the reason someone can’t benefit from our app. To learn about our scholarship program, reach out to support@wakingup.com. Subscriptions renew unless auto-renew is disabled 24 hours before the current period ends. Manage in Apple account settings. Payment charged to your Apple account. Terms: https://wakingup.com/terms-of-service/ Privacy: https://wakingup.com/privacy-policy/ Satisfaction guarantee: Email support@wakingup.com for a full refund.

description:
India’s #1 Newspaper Group “Dainik Bhaskar” brings to you their Made in India app for the latest Hindi news, Hindi ePaper & Video News from your city and town. 

Dainik Bhaskar is India’s leading newspaper group in Hindi. We have extensive coverage of 2000+ cities across the country. We are the leading news source for coverage for all cities of Madhya Pradesh (MP), Rajasthan, Bihar, Gujarat, Chhattisgarh, Jharkhand, Punjab, Haryana, Chandigarh and Himachal. 

We are your one stop solution for trusted high quality journalism for all news from your village, town or city, in real time. Our team of 3000+ journalists has only one objective, ensuring you don’t miss the news that matters the most - local news from your city. 

Get the best Ad-free Hindi news experience so that there are no breaks in your news. Our in-depth and thorough reporting brings to you the truth behind events and happening and adds knowledge compared to any fake news and rumor circulating on social media - Kyunki Sach Kareeb se Dikhta Hai.

Feature List:

City News: Dainik Bhaskar brings to you news from over 2000+ towns & cities to your phone. You will never miss out on what is happening around you or in your hometown. You will get real time updates on all kinds of local news - crime, accidents, water shortage, electricity cuts, road construction, traffic jams, etc. 

Video News: Get all the updates about Local (City & Town), National, Global, Business, Sports, Health, Lifestyle, Tech & Auto in your preferred video formats. Watch all the latest news through short videos. You can share news videos with friends & family.

ePaper: Read the latest Hindi News ePaper from your city. Get access to 200+ ePapers editions all from till a year back. Download the ePaper & read it anytime you want. 

DB Originals: Get the best of investigative journalism and in-depth analysis of news with DB Originals. Don’t just know the news but also understand the impact of it on you. 

Women Content: DB has a dedicated team of women journalists who brings news that matters to you as a woman. Our team focuses on content that impacts your day to day life and narrates it from a female perspective 

Politics: Stay updated with all the latest news about politics and elections from across the country. Get access to everything said by all the leading politicians from Narendra Modi to Rahul Gandhi, Yogi to Akhilesh. Be informed about all the policies & promises of leading political parties like the Bharatiya Janta Party (BJP), Indian National Congress (INC), TMC, BSP, SP, etc. 

Accidents & Crimes: Get all the news & keep your loved ones informed about what is happening in the country & in your locality. Dainik Bhaskar reports to you all this news as soon as it breaks. 

Business: Get all the updates from the Business world with coverage of Share Market, SENSEX, BSE, NSE, NIFTY, Trading News, IPO, Gold Rate, etc. Get the most detailed coverage of the Business industry 

Rashifal: Get daily astrology & horoscope updates about Lovelife, career, health, wealth & more from well-known experts like Bejan Daruwalla, get Tarot card updates & know all about your numerology 

Sports: We bring to you all the latest sports updates, be it cricket, football, tennis, athletics, Formula 1, WWE and more.

Bollywood, Hollywood and K-Pop: Stay updated with all the latest gossip, rumours & reviews from India and around the world. Always remain on top of all the trends, see what your favourite stars are doing and wearing.

Realtime Notifications

No Fake News: Stay away from all the rumors circulating on Whatsapp. 

Download the Dainik Bhaskar App now and get real time updates from your city

description:
Love the experience of reading a print newspaper all day long and also want the convenience of carrying it in your pocket? We have just the solution for you – The Hindu ePaper app, an exact digital replica of India’s leading national daily.

Whether on your phone or tablet, simply download the app and flip through the pages like you would with a print newspaper. In short, enjoy the same familiar joy of reading The Hindu’s reliable news, but in a different avatar, right from the palm of your hand. Read on to discover more about The Hindu ePaper app and the many exciting offerings it brings.

COVERAGE AND CONTENT PAR EXCELLENCE

Catch up on current events with verified and reliable news at your fingertips.

Delivered straight to your devices, The Hindu newspaper is put together by leading Indian and international journalists who report the real story and express their views on the most pressing issues of the day.

Stay ahead of the times on both Indian and international updates across sections and supplements such as Regional, State, South, Editorial, News, Foreign, Business, Sports, Science, FAQ, Profiles, Text & Context, Photo Feature, Weekend, Sunday Magazine, EducationPlus, Opportunities, Classifieds and others.

Read from 17 newspaper editions in one app. From the ad-free international edition to regional editions from across India, including Bengaluru, Chennai, Coimbatore, Delhi, Erode, Hyderabad, Kochi, Kolkata, Kozhikode, Madurai, Mangalore, Mumbai, Thiruvananthapuram, Tiruchirappalli, Vijayawada and Visakhapatnam.

Explore editorials written by the most influential voices in India and abroad, shaping the narrative of our times.

Delve into explanatory articles, quizzes, games and others with The Hindu ePaper’s Learning Corner, an exclusive interactive space focussed on current affairs, vocabulary, grammar, comprehension and more.

Bank on the ePaper app for your SSC, UPSC and other competitive exams.

The Hindu newspaper is every aspirant’s one-stop shop for accurate information, reliable reportage, eye-opening editorials and more.

Test your awareness of news and current events with the exclusive ‘Daily Quiz’ section in the ePaper app.

Receive our Editor’s Pick newsletter, which provides a detailed explanation of the day’s front-page story and its significance. You’ll also get handpicked links to recent editorials and daily reminders for our ePaper quiz.

Access 30 days of archives and catch up on news anytime, anywhere.

FEATURES AND EXPERIENCE REDEFINED

Flip through the pages or use the section-wise navigation.

Pick a font you like and choose from three different views: article view, page view and overview.

Switch to the ‘Read aloud’ option and listen to the news being read instead.
Use ‘Search’ to find topics or articles that interest you.

Download or print articles, or the entire publication for offline reading. Locate downloaded articles and publications in the ‘Downloads’ section of the app settings.

Bookmark your favourite articles and access them in the dedicated ‘Favourites’ section.

Crop, save and share articles.

The Hindu ePaper app has much more to offer. Curious to find out?

Download it today and explore all its content and features. First-time users get a free seven-day trial and subscription plans are as affordable as a cup of coffee per month!

Your daily hunt for trustworthy news ends here!

ABOUT THE PUBLISHER:

THG PUBLISHING PRIVATE LIMITED: The Hindu Group has been established from the times of India's colonial period and today it has a slew of print and digital publications. Some of the top publications include:

The Hindu (English news daily)

The Hindu Tamil (Tamil news daily)

The Hindu ePaper & Businessline ePaper

Businessline (Business News daily)

Frontline (Fortnightly national magazine)

Sportstar (Sports magazine)

Share your feedback and suggestions at product.support@thehindu.co.in.
